Then the character using this power must make a Logic vs. the target's Logic defense action check. On a success, the new mind is copied over. On a Fantastic success, the mind takes over the target's body with the body's Focus fully restored. If a body is taken over in this way, the original mind remains and cannot be removed. It can try to take over its body again if the new controller of the body becomes demoralized. If a character with extra minds in their head is shattered, all extra minds in it are permanently lost, in addition to the regular effects.
powers.flavor: The character can move whole minds around.

powers.name: Copy Trait
powers.summary: Duplicate one trait from a target within 10 spaces via concentration.
powers.description: The character picks one trait another character within 10 spaces has and duplicates it. They can now use it as if it was always theirs.
powers.flavor: The character duplicates another character's trait.

powers.name: Cosmic Awareness
powers.summary: Sense status of any known target anywhere in the same universe.
powers.description: The character can sense selected things at any distance from them, as long as they are in the same universe as what they are attempting to detect. This can include the location, relative velocity and overall emotional and physical status of any item, creature or group known to the character.
powers.flavor: The character can detect details about things anywhere in the universe.

powers.name: Counterstrike Technique
powers.summary: Reaction to deal half damage back while in Attack Stance.
powers.description: The character deals half the attacker's regular damage to the attacker.
powers.flavor: The character counters an enemy's strike with one of their own.
powers.trigger: While Attack Stance is active, a close attack against the character does damage.

powers.name: Covering Fire
powers.summary: Agility attack vs Vigilance; target takes damage to Focus.
powers.description: The character makes an Agility attack against a target’s Vigilance defense. If the attack is a success, apply Health Damage Reduction normally. The target takes any damage to their Focus.
powers.flavor: The character covers an ally's attack.
powers.trigger: An ally within the character's line of sight begins its turn.
powers.fantasticEffect: If it’s a Fantastic success, the damage is doubled, and if the target takes any Focus damage, they are stunned for one round.

powers.name: Crimson Bands of Cyttorak
powers.summary: Ego check to paralyze a target with magical bands.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check with an edge against the Melee defense of a target in their line of sight. If the attack is a success, the crimson bands paralyze the target. Breaking out of the crimson bands requires a Melee check with target number 18.
powers.flavor: The character unleashes red bands of magic that lash out to capture their target.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target can be pinned too.

powers.name: Crushing Grip
powers.summary: Melee vs Resilience attack on grabbed target; pins on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character makes a Melee attack against the grabbed target's Resilience defense. If it’s a success, the target takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character seizes an enemy and squeezes hard.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage instead and is pinned.

powers.name: Cure-All
powers.summary: Touch to cure acute conditions and stabilize Focus/Health.
powers.description: With a touch, the character can cure any temporary ailments a target suffers from. The character makes an Ego vs. TN 12 action check. On a success, the effects of the ailment end immediately. This can affect conditions including ablaze, bleeding, blinded, corroding, deafened, demoralized, paralyzed, poisoned and unconscious. If the target was demoralized, they now have 1 Focus, and if the target was unconscious, they now have 1 Health. (They can have more if the character got a Fantastic success and recovered more for them.) Note that this only works on acute conditions and diseases, those the target has contracted recently and that would—under ideal circumstances—resolve soon, leaving them alive. It does not affect chronic or permanent diseases or serious diseases that are likely to be fatal. For instance, it can cure temporary deafness but not permanent deafness. It can stop an allergy attack but not the allergies themselves, It can cure poison but not cancer. It has no effect against the Techno-Organic virus, the Transmode virus, the Legacy virus or other such diseases.
powers.flavor: The character can cure what ails you—mostly.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, treat the result like a recovery check, and the target gains back that much of any Health and Focus lost to the condition.

powers.name: Dampen Power
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to halve target's power effectiveness.
powers.description: The character picks one power from another character within 20 spaces and makes an Ego attack against them. On a success, they tamp the power down. If the power has ranges or effective areas or durations, these are halved. If the power affects a damage multiplier, subtract 1 from the effect. The power can no longer enjoy Fantastic successes. If the power has a Focus cost, the character must also pay that cost to dampen it.
powers.flavor: The character tamps down another character's power.

powers.name: Dance of Death
powers.summary: Agility check dealing half damage to all enemies within 10 spaces.
powers.description: The character makes an Agility check and compares that against the Agility defense of every enemy within 10 spaces and in their line of sight. Each success does half the regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character spins about, shooting at every enemy around them.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, each enemy takes full damage instead and is bleeding.

powers.name: Danger Sense
powers.summary: Always act in the bonus round of combat.
powers.description: Even if the character doesn’t get a Fantastic result on their initiative check, they get a turn during the bonus round of any combat they are in. This works even if no one else in the combat can act in the bonus round.
powers.flavor: The character can feel danger on the way.

powers.name: Darkness
powers.summary: Fill an area (5 spaces/rank) with total darkness.
powers.description: An area up to 5 spaces wide per the character's rank—centered on anything the character wishes, within 50 spaces—is filled with inky darkness. Those inside it cannot see anything, and no lights work within it except those generated by powers. The character must remain within 50 spaces of the affected area to avoid breaking concentration.
powers.flavor: The targets become shrouded in unnatural darkness.

powers.name: Dazzle
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to blind target for one turn.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against an enemy in their line of sight and compares that against the target’s Vigilance defense. If the attack is a success, the enemy is blinded for 1 turn. Alternatively, the character can blind the victim with darkness.
powers.flavor: The character blasts a blinding light into the face of their foe.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, it also inflicts regular damage.

powers.name: Deafen
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to deafen target for one turn.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against an enemy in their line of sight and compares that against the target's Vigilance defense. If the attack is a success, the enemy is deafened for one turn.
powers.flavor: The character slaps silence into the target's ears.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, it also inflicts regular damage.

powers.name: Defense Stance
powers.summary: Close attacks against you have trouble until you are hit.
powers.description: Any close attacks made against the character have trouble until they are successfully attacked in this combat.
powers.flavor: The character enters a fluid defensive stance, hands poised to parry and counterattack.

powers.name: Detect Lie
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to detect lies in verbal communication.
powers.description: When someone communicates in an active form the character can understand—verbally, telepathically, using sign language and so on—the character can make an Ego check against the communicator’s Ego defense. On a success, the character knows if the communicator is lying. This power does not allow the character to know the truth, although they may be able to figure it out by detecting lies. Also, it only works on communicators who know they are lying. If they believe what they are saying — even if it is wrong — no lie can be detected.
powers.flavor: The character can tell if you're telling the truth.
powers.trigger: Verbal communication the character can understand
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they also know (if possible) why the communicator is lying.

powers.name: Detect Supers
powers.summary: Sense count, distance, and direction of super-powered people.
powers.description: The character can sense anyone within a certain distance of them who has super-powers. This reveals a count of the number of people who have powers and their rough distance and direction from the character. It doesn't supply any other information, like name, appearance, the type of powers and so on. Note that powers that can be picked by someone with the Special Training origin are not considered super-powers. When the character picks this power, they have two options. They can take the power as it is, or they can limit it to detecting powers from a single origin, like Mutant or Alien (including all subtypes). If they take the regular power, its range is 5 miles. If they take a limited power, its range is 25 miles. For example, the character can have Detect Supers with a range of 5 miles or Detect Supers: Mutants with a range of 25 miles.
powers.flavor: The character can sense super-powered people.

powers.name: Dimensional Portal
powers.summary: Open portal for two-way travel between dimensions.
powers.description: The character opens a glowing portal in a space next to them that moves anything that enters it between that space and its destination, which forms a matched glowing portal in the other place. The other end of the portal must be in a clear space in another dimension that the character has been to. Anything can move through the portal in either direction until it is closed, which the character can do at will.
powers.flavor: The character opens a portal to another place.

powers.name: Dimensional Travel
powers.summary: Instantly move to another dimension in the same universe.
powers.description: The character instantly moves from their current dimension to another dimension within the same universe. For instance: from Earth to Asgard, Limbo or K’'un-Lun. When they move to the other dimension, they can arrive in any place they've been to before. Otherwise, they arrive at the most common entrance to that dimension.
powers.flavor: The character moves from one dimension to another.

powers.name: Dimensional Travel Other
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to send grabbed target to another dimension.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Vigilance defense of a target they have grabbed. If the check is successful, the character can send the target to another dimension. The target can be sent to any location in that dimension that the character has been to before. Otherwise, the target arrives at the most common entrance to that dimension.
powers.flavor: The character sends someone to another dimension.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed

powers.name: Dimensional Travel Together
powers.summary: Move self and touched/grabbed target to another dimension.
powers.description: The character moves to a different dimension, taking any person they are touching with them. If the target does not wish to come along, the character must grab them first. When they move to the other dimension, they can arrive in any place they've been to before. Otherwise, they arrive at the most common entrance to that dimension.
powers.flavor: The character brings someone with them to another dimension.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed

powers.name: Discipline 1
powers.summary: +1 to Ego damage multiplier and Ego checks (non-attack).
powers.description: The character adds +1 to their Ego damage multiplier, and they gain a +1 bonus to Ego checks other than attacks.
powers.flavor: The character works to hone their power.

powers.name: Discipline 2
powers.summary: +2 to Ego damage multiplier and Ego checks (non-attack).
powers.description: The character adds +2 to their Ego damage multiplier, and they gain a +2 bonus to Ego checks other than attacks.
powers.flavor: The character is more in touch with their power than ever.

powers.name: Discipline 3
powers.summary: +3 to Ego damage multiplier and Ego checks (non-attack).
powers.description: The character adds +4 to their Ego damage multiplier, and they gain a +4 bonus to Ego checks other than attacks.
powers.flavor: Few can top the character's grasp on their power.

powers.name: Discipline 4
powers.summary: +4 to Ego damage multiplier and Ego checks (non-attack).
powers.description: The character adds +4 to their Ego damage multiplier, and they gain a +4 bonus to Ego checks other than attacks.
powers.flavor: The character has mastered their power.

powers.name: Disguise
powers.summary: Alter appearance; TN to see through is Ego defense.
powers.description: The character instantly alters their appearance so that they appear to be someone else. The target number for anyone trying to see through the disguise is the character's Ego defense. If the character is impersonating someone known to the other person, that person has an edge.
powers.flavor: The character appears to be someone else.

powers.name: Dispel Spell
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to break magic concentration.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Ego defense of a target using a magic power that requires concentration. On a success, the target's concentration on that power is broken.
powers.flavor: The character puts an end to a foe’s magic.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target's concentration is broken entirely.

powers.name: Disrupt Electronics
powers.summary: Scramble electronics by phasing through them.
powers.description: When phasing through electronics, the character can scramble them, causing them to either shut down or crash. In the case of powers that are Tech Reliant (and feature electronics), they are unusable for one turn while they reboot.
powers.flavor: The character can scramble electronics by moving through them.

powers.name: Disrupt Nerves
powers.summary: Ego vs Resilience check to stun target via phasing.
powers.description: When phasing through a person, the character can attempt to scramble their nervous system. The character makes an Ego check against the target’s Resilience defense. On a success, the target is stunned for one round,
powers.flavor: The character can scramble someone's nervous system.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target also falls prone.

powers.name: Disrupt Person
powers.summary: Melee attack while phasing that ignores Health DR.
powers.description: The character becomes the slightest bit solid while phasing themselves or a phased weapon through someone. They make a close attack. On a success, the attack does normal damage, ignoring any Health Damage Reduction.
powers.flavor: The character can hurt someone with their phasing powers.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the attack does double damage instead, ignoring any Health Damage Reduction, and the target is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Do This All Day
powers.summary: Heal 2 Health for every 1 Focus spent.
powers.description: The character heals 2 points of Health for every point of Focus they spend.
powers.flavor: The character draws on their inner strength to heal themselves.

powers.name: Domination
powers.summary: Logic check to permanently command 0-Focus target.
powers.description: The character dominates a target with whom they ve established a Telepathic Link and who has no Focus left. The character makes a Logic check with trouble against the target’s Logic defense. On a success, the target is completely dominated and will follow the character's orders. The result of the character’s check is the target number for any attempts by the target to end the domination. If any order involves harming someone, the target gets to make a Logic check to end the domination. If the target has the Heroic tag, they get an edge on the check. If the order would cause the target to harm themselves, the target gets an edge on the check. If they have the Heroic tag, they get a double edge.
powers.flavor: The character forces someone to follow their orders—permanently.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character gains an edge the next time they use this power against this same target.

powers.name: Double Tap
powers.summary: Ranged attack vs target within 2 spaces for regular damage.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack against an enemy within 2 spaces. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: To be twice as sure.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is bleeding.

powers.name: Edit Memory
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check to erase or implant memories.
powers.description: The character alters the memory of a target with whom they've established a Telepathic Link. This can be as simple as erasing a chunk of the target’s memory or as complicated as implanting entirely new memories. The Narrator sets the target number based on how complex the new memory is and how hard it would be to integrate such memories into the character's other memories. The character makes a Logic check against the target's Logic defense. On a success, the memories are altered. Any time the target is given good reason to doubt the edited memory, they can make a Logic check to refute the new version of their memories and recover their original memories. If they succeed, they remember both the original memory and the edited one.
powers.flavor: The character alters someone's memory.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target has trouble on checks to refute such memories in the future. When given good reason to doubt the edited memory, on a Fantastic success, they know for sure who did this to them.

powers.name: Elemental Barrage
powers.summary: Ego check dealing half damage to all enemies within 10 spaces.
powers.description: The character designates a space within their line of sight. The attack can affect every enemy within 10 spaces of that. The character makes a single Ego check and compares it to each target's Resilience defense. Affected enemies take half regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character hurls a barrage of their element at their foes.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they take full regular damage and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Barrier
powers.summary: Create elemental wall (2 spaces/rank) that absorbs 10 damage.
powers.description: The character forms a wall of their element within their line of sight and up to 10 spaces away per rank. This covers up to 2 spaces across (vertically/horizontally) per their rank. The character makes an Agility check and compares the results against the Agility defense of any target in the affected spaces. On a success, the character chooses which side of the barrier the target winds up on. On a failure, the target chooses. Attacks against the barrier are against the character's Ego defense. Any attacks against it that do 10 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the barrier continues, If an attack does more than 10 points of damage, it destroys the barrier. Either way, the attack leaves those behind the barrier unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character forms a wall of their element.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, [ELEMENT_EFFECT] as well.

powers.name: Elemental Blast
powers.summary: Ranged attack with edge; spend Focus for damage bonus.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack with an edge at an enemy in line of sight. For this attack, add +1 to the character's Agility damage bonus for every 2 points of Focus they spend. On a success, an affected target takes that total damage.
powers.flavor: The character blasts a foe with their element.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes double that total damage and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Burst
powers.summary: Ranged attack for regular elemental damage.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack against an enemy in line of sight. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character fires a burst of their element.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage instead and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Form
powers.summary: Body is pure element; allows re-forming at 1 Health.
powers.description: The character’s body is made entirely of their element, which gives them a steady supply of their element to use and makes them essentially unkillable. When they lose all their Health, their form loses its cohesion and falls apart. When they have at least 1 Health—which they can gain back over time, normally — they can re-form. If the character wishes to use their elemental body in unusual ways, they should pick Plasticity powers. If they wish to be able to be fully human at times, they should take the Shape-Shift power.
powers.flavor: The character's body is made of their element.

powers.name: Elemental Grab
powers.summary: Ego check vs Melee defense to grab target with element.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against a target's Melee defense within 5 spaces times the character's rank. If the attack is a success, the character grabs the target with their element. On a Fantastic success, the target can also be pinned and suffers the element's special effect. Breaking free requires a successful Melee check against target number 18.
powers.flavor: The character uses their element to snare a target.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target can also be pinned and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Infusion
powers.summary: Add elemental special effect to Fantastic handheld weapon attacks.
powers.description: The character infuses their energy into a handheld weapon in their grasp. When the character gets a Fantastic success attacking with the weapon, add the energy’s special effect.
powers.flavor: The character infuses their energy into a handheld weapon in their grasp.
powers.fantasticEffect: When the character gets a Fantastic success attacking with the weapon, [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Prison
powers.summary: Ego check vs Agility defense to trap targets in elemental cage.
powers.description: The character picks a point within their line of sight and traps any chosen targets within up to 5 spaces times their rank—in a prison comprised of their element. When the Elemental Prison is formed, the character makes an Ego check and compares the results against the Agility defense of targets inside the enclosed spaces. On each success, the character traps the target within the prison's perimeter. Attacks against the prison are against the character's Ego defense. Any attacks against the prison are absorbed as if made against the character's Elemental Protection power, and the prison continues. If an attack does more damage than the character's Elemental Protection power can sustain, it destroys the prison, but no one inside is harmed.
powers.flavor: The character can create a cage of their element.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, such imprisoned people suffer full damage and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Protection 1
powers.summary: Elemental shield absorbs attacks of 10 damage or less.
powers.description: The character protects themselves with their element. Any attacks against them that do 10 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 10 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character protects themselves with their element.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Elemental Protection 2
powers.summary: Elemental armor absorbs attacks of 20 damage or less.
powers.description: The character protects themselves with their element. Any attacks against them that do 20 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 20 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character's elemental protection is like armor.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Elemental Protection 3
powers.summary: Elemental shield absorbs attacks of 30 damage or less.
powers.description: The character protects themselves with their element. Any attacks against them that do 30 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 30 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character's elemental protection is like a tank.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Elemental Protection 4
powers.summary: Elemental shield absorbs attacks of 40 damage or less.
powers.description: The character protects themselves with their element. Any attacks against them that do 40 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 40 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character's elemental protection is like a fortress.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Elemental Push
powers.summary: Ego check vs Agility defense to move target 1 space/rank.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against the target's Agility defense. If the attack succeeds, the character can move the target in any direction, up to 1 space times the character's rank.
powers.flavor: The character can move a target with their element.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target also takes regular damage, is knocked prone and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Elemental Reinforcement
powers.summary: Reaction to transfer Health damage from protection power to Focus.
powers.description: The character can transfer any Health damage that gets through an elemental power that grants damage protection to their Focus instead, leaving the protection intact.
powers.flavor: The character reinforces their powers with their element.
powers.trigger: Damage gets through an elemental power

powers.name: Elemental Ricochet
powers.summary: Ranged attack that bounces to extra targets on Fantastic Success.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack against a target in line of sight. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character bounces the burst off one foe and into another.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, energy also bounces off the first target to another in line of sight, and the character can make a new attack against that target, adding the new range to the previous attack’s range. This can be repeated until an attack is not fantastic. Also, [ELEMENT_EFFECT]

powers.name: Elemental Sphere
powers.summary: Ego check vs Agility to create protective elemental sphere.
powers.description: The character envelops themselves — and any chosen people within up to 5 spaces times their rank — in a protective sphere comprised of their element. When the sphere is formed, the character makes an Ego check and compares the results against the Agility defense of unwanted characters in the enclosed spaces. On a success, the character can move any unwanted people within the sphere’s perimeter to spaces outside of the sphere. On a Fantastic success, such moved people suffer full damage and the element's special effect. Attacks against the sphere are against the character's Ego defense. Any attacks against the sphere are absorbed as if made against the character’s Elemental Protection power, and the sphere continues. If an attack does more damage than the character's Elemental Protection power can sustain, it destroys the sphere, but no one inside is harmed.
powers.flavor: The character can create a protective sphere of their element.

powers.name: Elemental Suffocation
powers.summary: Ego vs Resilience check to damage target grabbed with element.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against the grabbed target's Resilience defense. If the attack is a success, the target takes regular damage. With elements that aren't suited to suffocation, this power chokes the target instead.
powers.flavor: The character envelops a target's head in an element.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed with Elemental Grab
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target can also be pinned and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Energy Absorption
powers.summary: Reaction to convert Health damage taken into Focus.
powers.description: The character can take any Health damage done to them (after applying any damage reduction), ignore it and add that number to their Focus instead. In this way, they can increase their Focus up to double their regular maximum Focus. Once the combat is over, any extra Focus over the character's regular maximum Focus score fades away.
powers.flavor: The character turns damage into power.
powers.trigger: The character takes Health damage.

powers.name: Enter Dreams
powers.summary: The character can enter another person’s dream.
powers.description: The character instantly moves either into or out of another person’s dream. To do so, the dreamer must be asleep. The character has no direct control over the dream, but they can observe it and speak with people inside it, including the dreamer.

powers.name: Enter Dreams Together
powers.summary: The character can bring others with them into a person’s dream.
powers.description: The character moves into another person’s dream, taking any person they are touching with them. If the target does not wish to come along, the character must grab them first. The visitors to the dream have no direct control over the dream, but they can observe it and speak with people inside it, including the dreamer.

powers.name: Enter Dreamtime
powers.summary: The character can enter the realm of dreams.
powers.description: The character instantly moves either into or out of Dreamtime. While there, they can observe the dreams of anyone who is asleep at the time. However, they cannot enter any individual’s dream. When they leave Dreamtime for the real world, they return to the place where they began their journey.

powers.name: Enter Dreamtime Together
powers.summary: The character can bring others with them into Dreamtime.
powers.description: The character instantly moves either into or out of Dreamtime, taking any person they are touching with them. If the target does not wish to come along, the character must grab them first. While there, they can observe the dreams of anyone who is asleep at the time. However, they cannot enter any individual’s dream. When they leave Dreamtime for the real world, they return to the place where they began their journey.

powers.name: Environmental Protection
powers.summary: Immunity to extreme cold, heat, pressure, radiation, and vacuum.
powers.description: The character is not harmed by intense cold or heat, the pressure of the deep seas or the intense radiation and vacuum of space. The player can choose any or all of these protections, as best fits with the character concept.
powers.flavor: Environmental effects don't bother the character.

powers.name: ESP
powers.summary: Logic vs Vigilance check to sense location and status of others.
powers.description: The character can reach out with their mind to sense the presence of others within 100 spaces per rank. This tells them the person’s location and general status. It can can also identify if they have super-powers or not. If a target or targets wish to remain undetected, the character must make a Logic check and compare it against each target’s Vigilance defense. If they succeed, they sense the target.
powers.flavor: The character can sense the presence of others.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they can also identify the source of any powers the target has.

powers.name: Evasion
powers.summary: Use Agility defense score against Melee attacks too.
powers.description: The character can use their Agility defense score against Melee attacks too.

featureNote.agility: You can use your Agility defense score against Melee attacks too.

powers.name: Evil Eye
powers.summary: Spend 5 Focus/turn to give target trouble via concentration.
powers.description: The character picks a foe in their line of sight. That foe has trouble on all action checks made for the power’s duration. There is no limit on the range between the character and the foe once the power is activated. The character must pay the Focus cost at the start of each of their subsequent turns of concentration to keep the power working.
powers.flavor: The character can inflict trouble on those who cross their path.

powers.name: Exorcism
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to break a possessor's concentration.
powers.description: The character attempts to remove the possessor from a possessed target. The character makes an Ego check against the possessor’s Ego defense, On a success, the possessor 's concentration is broken, ending the possession. On a Fantastic success, all of the possessor’s concentrations are broken, and the possessor is stunned for one round too.
powers.flavor: The character removes an intruder from someone's body.

powers.name: Exploit
powers.summary: Melee vs Resilience attack to ignore Health DR.
powers.description: The character makes a Melee attack against the target’s Resilience defense score. If the attack is a success, the damage it does ignores Health Damage Reduction.
powers.flavor: The character finds a weak spot and exploits it.
powers.trigger: A Fantastic success on an attack using the character’s weapon that deals at least 1 point of damage
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target suffers double damage and [MELEE_EFFECT].

powers.name: Extend Invisibility
powers.summary: Make a touched person or object invisible via concentration.
powers.description: The character makes something — a single person or object — within reach invisible. This can be one size bigger than them for every rank they have.
powers.flavor: The character makes something else invisible.

powers.name: Extended Reach 1
powers.summary: The character's reach quadruples.
powers.description: The character's reach quadruples.
powers.flavor: The character's reach grows.

powers.name: Extended Reach 2
powers.summary: The character’s reach is 10 times normal.
powers.description: The character’s reach is 10 times normal.
powers.flavor: The character can reach a looong way.

powers.name: Fast Attacks
powers.summary: Two Melee attacks for half damage each; full on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character splits their attack to make two close attacks against separate targets within reach (or they can focus a single attack on a single target). Make a single Melee check and compare it to the targets’ Melee defenses. On a success, the affected target takes half regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character's weapons lash out!
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the affected target takes full damage, [MELEE_EFFECT], and the character can make a bonus attack with this power against any target within reach, with the same effect.

powers.name: Fast Hands
powers.summary: Gain +1 reaction per round for Ranged Weapons powers.
powers.description: The character gains one additional reaction per round. This reaction can be used only to trigger a Ranged Weapons power.
powers.flavor: The character can shoot faster than the eye can blink.

powers.name: Fast Strikes
powers.summary: Two Melee attacks for half damage each; full on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character splits their attack to make two close attacks against separate targets within reach (or they can focus a single attack on a single target). Make a single Melee check and compare it to the targets’ Melee defenses. On a success, the affected target takes half regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character unleashes a flurry of strikes.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the affected target takes full damage.

powers.name: Flames of the Faltine
powers.summary: Ego vs Agility attack (range 10) for regular elemental damage.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Agility defense of a target in their line of sight. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character shoots jets of enchanted fire from their hands.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage and then suffers 5 points of damage at the end of every round until someone uses an action to put out the flames.

powers.name: Flare
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to blind all within 5 spaces.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check and compares that against the Vigilance defense of every enemy within 5 spaces. Each beaten enemy is blinded for one turn.
powers.flavor: The character generates a dazzling flare of light.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the flare inflicts regular damage too.

powers.name: Flexible Bones 1
powers.summary: Gain Health DR 1 and edge on contortion/escape checks.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 1. They also have an edge on Agility checks for contortion and escape.
powers.flavor: The character's skeleton is rubbery.

featureNote.agility: Edge on Agility checks for contortion and escape

powers.name: Flexible Bones 2
powers.summary: Gain Health DR 2 and double edge on contortion/escape checks.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 2. They also have a double edge on Agility checks for contortion and escape.
powers.flavor: The character's skeleton is flexible and pliable.

featureNote.agility: Double Edge on Agility checks for contortion and escape

powers.name: Flexible Fingers
powers.summary: Automatically pick key locks and form hands into simple tools.
powers.description: With a standard action, the character can automatically pick any lock that requires a physical key. They can also shape their hands to form almost any other kind of simple tool.
powers.flavor: The character can turn their fingers and hands into whatever tool they need.

powers.name: Flight 1
powers.summary: Fly at Rank × Run Speed; 3x speed outside combat.
powers.description: The character can fly. Their combat Flight Speed is equal to their rank times their Run Speed. Outside of combat, they can move three times their Flight Speed.
powers.flavor: The character can soar into the sky.

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your flight speed is ×3.

powers.name: Flight 2

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your flight speed is ×50.

powers.summary: Fly at 50x speed outside of combat.
powers.description: Outside of combat, the character can fly up to 50 times their Flight Speed.
powers.flavor: The character can zoom across the sky.

powers.name: Flying Double Kick
powers.summary: Melee attack vs two enemies; Fantastic success knocks prone.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack against two enemies within reach. If an attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character leaps into the air and snap kicks two enemies at once.
powers.fantasticEffect: If an attack is a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is knocked prone.

powers.name: Focus Fire
powers.summary: Allies in earshot gain edge on checks vs specific enemy.
powers.description: The character calls out an enemy in line of sight and inspires one or more allies of their choice in earshot, up to the character's Vigilance. They gain an edge on all action checks against that enemy.
powers.flavor: The character calls out a target.

powers.name: Focused Fury
powers.summary: Melee attack with edge; spend Focus for damage bonus.
powers.description: Make a close attack with an edge. Add +1 to Melee damage bonus for every 2 Focus spent. On a success, an affected target takes that total damage.
powers.flavor: The character channels their rage into a devastating blow.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes double that total damage and [MELEE_EFFECT].

powers.name: Focused Strike
powers.summary: Melee attack; spend Focus for damage bonus.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack. Add +1 to the character’s Melee damage bonus for every 2 points of Focus they spend. On a success, an affected target takes that total damage.
powers.flavor: The character finds the right spot and strikes.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes double that total damage and is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Fool
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check to alter appearance in target minds.
powers.description: The character uses a mirage to alter their appearance in the minds of anyone within 20 spaces per rank. Cameras (for instance) can still record them normally, but when people look in the character's direction, they see someone else. The target number for anyone trying to see through the mirage is the character’s Logic defense. If the character is impersonating someone known to the other person, that person has an edge.
powers.flavor: The character makes people believe they are someone else.

powers.name: Furious Attacks
powers.summary: Two Melee attacks; half damage and spend Focus for dmg bonus.
powers.description: The character splits their attack to make two close attacks against separate targets within reach (or they can focus a single attack on a single target). Make a single Melee check and compare it to the targets’ Melee defenses. For these attacks, add +1 to the character's Melee damage bonus for every 2 points of Focus they spend. On a success, an affected target takes half that total damage.
powers.flavor: The character’s weapons smash into the foe.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes full damage and [MELEE_EFFECT].

powers.name: Grand Mirage
powers.summary: Create full-sensory mirage for all Telepathic Network members.
powers.description: The character creates a full-sensory mirage that affects everyone in a Telepathic Network they set up who is also in the same locale. The mirage can be of anything the character desires, and it can move freely.
powers.flavor: The character can make a mirage appear in a group's mind.

powers.name: Grand Fool
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check to hide self and allies via mirage.
powers.description: The character uses a mirage to alter their appearance — and the appearance of up to one other person per rank, within 10 spaces — in the minds of people within 20 spaces per rank. Cameras (for instance) can still record them, but when people look in the characters’ direction, they see other people. The target number for anyone trying to see through the mirage is the character's Logic defense. If the affected characters are impersonating people known to the other person, that person has an edge.
powers.flavor: The character mentally makes the group they're with appear to be like other people.

powers.name: Grand Illusion
powers.summary: Create sound/sight hologram (+5 size) within 50 spaces.
powers.description: The character creates a sound and sight illusion anywhere in line of sight, within 50 spaces. The illusion can be of anything up to five sizes larger than the character, and it can move freely within its limits. The character breaks concentration if they move beyond 50 spaces from the illusion or lose line of sight of it.
powers.flavor: By manipulating light and sound, the character creates an incredibly real hologram.

powers.name: Grappling Technique
powers.summary: Melee attack for regular damage and grab; pin on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage and is grabbed.
powers.flavor: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage instead and is pinned too.

powers.name: Ground-Shaking Stomp
powers.summary: Melee check dealing half damage to all targets within reach + rank.
powers.description: The character makes a Melee check and compares that against the Agility defense of every target within the character's reach plus their rank in spaces. Any targets the attack succeeds against take half regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character smashes the ground so hard the earth trembles.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the targets take full damage and are knocked prone.

powers.name: Group Flight
powers.summary: Carry 1 ally per Ego into the air at half speed.
powers.description: For every point of Ego the character has, they can hoist one ally into the air with them. The Flight Speed of the group is half the character’s, and all affected allies must remain within 5 spaces times the character's rank. The character controls each ally’s speed and position during the character's turn, but they can release any or all allies at any time.
powers.flavor: The character can carry others with them into the sky.

powers.name: Group Invisibility
powers.summary: Make self and allies (1 per Ego defense) invisible.
powers.description: For every point of Ego defense the character has, they can make one person or thing invisible, including themselves. Each of these can be one size bigger than them for every rank they have.
powers.flavor: The character can make something else invisible.

powers.name: Group Levitation
powers.summary: Move self and 1 person/rank through air at Run Speed.
powers.description: The character can move up to one person per rank through the air in any direction at the character's Run Speed. The levitated target(s) must remain within 5 spaces times the character's rank. If any target does not wish to be moved like this, they must be telekinetically grabbed first.

powers.name: Grow 1
powers.summary: Grow up to Huge size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can grow up to huge size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character sizes up!
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Grow 2
powers.summary: Grow up to Gigantic size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can grow up to gigantic size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character becomes even bigger!
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Grow 3
powers.summary: Grow up to Titanic size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can grow up to titanic size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character can be the size of a house!
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Grow 4
powers.summary: Grow up to Gargantuan size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can grow up to gargantuan size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character can tackle kaiju!
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Growing Attack
powers.summary: Melee attack with edge while growing in size.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack with an edge. If the attack succeeds, they do regular damage for the size they are growing to.
powers.flavor: The character attacks as they grow.
powers.trigger: The character grows.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they do double damage and stun the target.

powers.name: Headshot
powers.summary: Ranged attack with trouble; deals double damage and stuns.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack with trouble on an enemy within the weapon’s range. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes double normal damage. If the enemy suffers any actual damage, they are stunned for one round.
powers.flavor: Ouch!
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes triple damage.

powers.name: Healing Factor
powers.summary: Regain Health equal to Resilience at the end of each turn.
powers.description: At the end of the character's turn, they regain Health equal to their Resilience. (This works outside of combat too, quickly bringing them back to full Health.)
powers.flavor: The character heals amazingly fast.

featureNote.health: Regain Health equal to Resilience at end of turn

powers.name: Healing Hands
powers.summary: Touch to heal 1 Health per 1 Focus spent (min 10 Focus).
powers.description: The character can heal a target creature with a touch. For every point of Focus the character spends, the target regains a point of Health, up to their maximum score. The character must spend at least 10 Focus to use the power. Any Health points that would have been healed beyond the target's maximum Health are lost.
powers.flavor: The character has a healing touch.

powers.name: Heightened Senses 1
powers.summary: Double sense range and edge on Vigilance to perceive.
powers.description: The character can sense things roughly twice as far away as normal. They also have an edge on Vigilance checks to perceive things, and enemies have trouble on checks they make to sneak past the character.
powers.flavor: The character has superior senses.

featureNote.vigilance: Edge on Vigilance checks to perceive things

powers.name: Heightened Senses 2
powers.summary: Quadruple sense range and double edge on Vigilance to perceive.
powers.description: The character can sense things roughly four times as far away as normal. Their senses are so sharp that they can use some of them to compensate for the loss of others (say, if blinded or deafened). They can even listen to the heartbeat of a person in the same room to see if they are lying — although this is as reliable as a traditional lie detector: far from 100% and not admissible in court. They also have a double edge on Vigilance checks to perceive things, and enemies have double trouble on checks they make to sneak past the character.
powers.flavor: The character has senses as sharp as radar.

featureNote.vigilance: Double edge on Vigilance checks to perceive things

powers.name: Hellfire Chains
powers.summary: Ego attack using hellfire chains; grabs/paralyzes on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character summons chains covered in hellfire and can use them to bind or smash targets. They can attack anyone within 10 spaces per rank and line of sight. Make an Ego attack. On a success, the target takes regular Health damage. If a target is grabbed by the hellfire chains, on each subsequent round, the character can make an Ego check against the target’s Resilience defense to inflict regular Health damage and regular Focus damage. Breaking free from the hellfire chains requires a Melee check with a target number of 18.
powers.flavor: The character shoots out chains covered in hellfire.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is grabbed and paralyzed too.

powers.name: Hex Bolt
powers.summary: Ego check vs Agility defense to deal regular elemental damage.
powers.description: The character fires a hex bolt at a foe. Make an Ego check against the target's Agility defense. On a success, the attack does regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character hurls a hex bolt at their foe.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, it does double damage and causes the target trouble for one round.

powers.name: Hit & Run
powers.summary: Melee attack with edge and free half-speed movement.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack with an edge on an enemy. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage, and the character can make an additional movement up to half their Run Speed for free.
powers.flavor: The character hits hard and keeps moving!
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and [MELEE_EFFECT].

powers.name: Hit the Dirt
powers.summary: Reaction to allow all allies in earshot to fall prone.
powers.description: All allies within earshot can fall prone if they wish and are able to. If falling prone makes the ally an ineligible target for the initial attack, the attack automatically fails.
powers.flavor: The character gets their allies to take cover.
powers.trigger: The character gets their allies to take cover

powers.name: Hurled Shield Bash
powers.summary: Ranged attack (10×rank) with shield; bounces back.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack on an enemy. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage. The shield then bounces back to the character.
powers.flavor: The character hurls their mighty shield at an enemy.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is knocked prone.

powers.name: Hurled Shield Block
powers.summary: Give ally (range 5×rank) Health DR from your shield.
powers.description: The ally gains Health Damage Reduction equal to the character’s Shield power against that attack. The shield then bounces back to the character.
powers.flavor: The character hurls their mighty shield to protect an ally from an attack.
powers.trigger: An enemy makes an attack against an ally’s Agility

powers.name: Hurled Shield Deflection
powers.summary: Reaction to give enemy trouble on attack vs ally.
powers.description: The enemy has trouble on the attack. The shield then bounces back to the character.
powers.flavor: The character hurls their mighty shield to save an ally from an attack.
powers.trigger: An enemy makes an attack against an ally's Agility

powers.name: Iconic Item
powers.summary: Own a unique item that grants specific powers.
powers.description: The character is known for owning and using a unique and powerful item, like Mjolnir (Thor's hammer) or Captain America's shield. The Narrator must approve the details of this item. This power can be taken more than once, but each time must be with a different item.

powers.name: Iconic Weapon
powers.summary: Own a unique weapon that grants specific powers.
powers.description: The character is known for owning and using a unique and powerful weapon, like Mjolnir (Thor's hammer) or Captain America's shield. The Narrator must approve the details of this weapon. This power can be taken more than once, but each time must be with a different weapon.

powers.name: Icy Tendrils of Ikthalon
powers.summary: Ego vs Agility attack for regular damage and paralysis.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Agility defense of a target in their line of sight. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character unleashes freezing tendrils at a foe.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double that total damage and is paralyzed by the ice.

powers.name: Illumination
powers.summary: Illuminate an object or point within 50 spaces via concentration.
powers.description: The character illuminates one object or point in line of sight, within 50 spaces, with bright light. The character can maintain concentration on the effect even if they move out of range or line of sight.
powers.flavor: The character creates a bright light.

powers.name: Images of Ikonn
powers.summary: Create sound/sight illusory duplicates (1/rank) of a person.
powers.description: The character creates one sound and sight illusory duplicate per rank of one person they've met (including themselves). The duplicates look and sound exactly like the original and are under the character's complete control. They start in the same space as the character and instantly move into any open space around them, up to 2 spaces away, during which time the character can swap places with any of the duplicates. If the character is duplicating themselves, the character's player should secretly record which one is the actual character. The duplicates can move up to 10 spaces away from the character, and they can pretend to attack (and miss) opponents. Any attack that hits a duplicate instantly removes it. If the character successfully attacks someone or does something else to make the truth evident, the illusion ends. This spell can also be used to see through someone else's illusion. When used in this way, it gives the character a double edge on their Ego check.
powers.flavor: The character creates illusory duplicates of a person.

powers.name: Immovable
powers.summary: Reduce knockback by 1 space per point of Melee defense.
powers.description: For every point of Melee defense the character has, they can reduce knockback by 1 space.
powers.flavor: Nobody pushes the character around.
powers.trigger: The character is knocked back or knocked prone

powers.name: Indecipherable
powers.summary: Immunity to mental reading via a unique internal language.
powers.description: The character has constructed an internal language that only they can understand. They think in this language entirely, and when they communicate with others, they are translating from that language. This effectively renders them immune to telepathic powers like Mind Reading or Mind Interrogation, as anyone trying to read their mind cannot understand this unique language.
powers.flavor: The character has a language all their own.

powers.name: Information Upload
powers.summary: Instantly transmit a trait, tag, or knowledge to a linked target.
powers.description: The character transmits a knowledge-based label (a trait or tag) of their own to a target with whom they have established a telepathic link — willing or not. The label lasts until the target sleeps. The character can also impart any other kind of knowledge they have to a target this way. The process is almost instantaneous.
powers.flavor: The character can transmit loads of information straight into another's mind.

powers.name: Inspiration
powers.summary: Give an ally an edge on all checks for 1 round.
powers.description: The character inspires an ally in earshot. The ally gains an edge on all action checks until the start of the character's next turn.
powers.flavor: The character's words inspire their allies.

powers.name: Instant Replay
powers.summary: Reaction to immediately reroll a failed check (once per battle).
powers.description: Once per battle, the character can make a second attempt at a check that they just failed, erasing and replacing the first attempt entirely.
powers.flavor: The character rewinds time.
powers.trigger: The character fails a check

powers.name: Integrity
powers.summary: Use Logic defense score against Ego attacks too.
powers.description: The character can use their Logic defense score against Ego attacks too.
powers.flavor: The character can think their way through.

featureNote.logic: You can use your Logic defense score against Ego attacks too.

powers.name: Intuition
powers.summary: Get a sense of the best long-term choice from the Narrator.
powers.description: When faced with a decision, the character can get a feeling about which choice would be best for them in the long run. When activating this power, the player presents the choice to the Narrator, and the Narrator tells them which choice the intuition is leading the character toward. Characters should take care when using this power. What is best for them might not be best for the rest of the team or anyone else they care about. Also, what’s best in the long run might not be best for the character in the short run. In fact, what’s best is often up for interpretation.
powers.flavor: The character has a bad feeling about this.

powers.name: Invisibility
powers.summary: Become invisible; edge on sneaking and trouble to detect.
powers.description: The character becomes invisible. They have an edge on Agility checks to sneak past people, and enemies have trouble on Vigilance checks to perceive them. It’s even harder to spot things that are invisible but aren't moving. Characters must be actively trying to do so to be able to make a Vigilance check.
powers.flavor: The character turns as transparent as glass.

featureNote.agility: Edge on checks to sneak past people

powers.name: Jinx
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to give target trouble on all actions.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the target's Ego defense. If it succeeds, the target has trouble on all actions.
powers.flavor: The character puts a jinx on a foe.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target loses their next standard action.

powers.name: Jinx You
powers.summary: Melee touch to give a target trouble via concentration.
powers.description: The character makes a Melee check to touch the target. On a success, the power takes effect, and that foe has trouble on all action checks made for the power's duration. The character must pay the Focus cost at the start of each of their subsequent turns of concentration to keep the power working.
powers.flavor: The character can hit you with a jinx.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target also takes standard (not doubled) Melee damage.

powers.name: Jinx You All
powers.summary: Give multiple foes (1/rank) trouble via concentration.
powers.description: The character picks up to one foe per rank in their line of sight. Those foes have trouble on all action checks made for the power's duration. There is no limit on the range from the character to their foes once the power is activated. The character must pay the Focus cost at the start of each of their subsequent turns of concentration to keep the power working.
powers.flavor: The character can jinx a whole group of foes at once.

powers.name: Jump 1
powers.summary: Gain Jump movement mode with Speed equal to Run Speed.
powers.description: The character gains the Jump movement mode with a Jump Speed equal to their Run Speed. They can jump this distance in any direction, vertically as well as horizontally.
powers.flavor: The character can leap about like a frog.

powers.name: Jump 2
powers.summary: Jump Speed is Rank × Run Speed; 3x speed outside combat.
powers.description: The character's Jump Speed is equal to their rank times their Run Speed. Outside of combat, they can move three times as fast.
powers.flavor: The character can leap around with dazzling speed.

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your jump speed is ×3.

powers.name: Jump 3
powers.summary: Jump at 50x speed outside of combat.
powers.description: Outside of combat, the character can jump up to 50 times their Jump Speed.
powers.flavor: The character can leap around with dazzling speed.

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your jump speed is ×50.

powers.name: Keep Moving
powers.summary: Reaction to end an ally's demoralized or stunned condition.
powers.description: The demoralized or stunned condition ends.
powers.flavor: The character can keep allies moving under fire.
powers.trigger: An ally in line of sight and earshot is demoralized or stunned

powers.name: Kill Zone
powers.summary: Reaction ranged attack when an enemy moves in line of sight.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack on the enemy. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes normal damage. The character regains their reaction. Each target can be affected by this attack by this character only once per round.
powers.flavor: The character shoots at every target that moves through their kill zone.
powers.trigger: An enemy in the character's line of sight starts to move
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage.

powers.name: Leaping Leglock
powers.summary: Melee attack for damage and grab; knocks both prone.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack against an enemy. If the attack is a success, the enemy is grabbed and dealt regular damage. Both the character and the enemy are knocked prone.
powers.flavor: The character leaps into the air and snaps their legs around an enemy.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is grabbed and stunned for one round.

powers.name: Leech Life
powers.summary: Ego vs Resilience check to steal Health from grabbed target.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against the target's Resilience defense. If it succeeds, the target takes regular Health damage, and the character heals half that much Health for themselves.
powers.flavor: The character consumes the life force of another.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character heals the full Health damage instead.

powers.name: Leg Sweep
powers.summary: Melee attack for regular damage and knock target prone.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack. If it succeeds, the enemy takes regular damage and is knocked prone.
powers.flavor: The character knocks the enemy's legs from under them.
powers.fantasticEffect: If it’s a Fantastic success, the enemy is stunned for one round too.

powers.name: Let's Go
powers.summary: Keep 0-Health ally awake and mobile via concentration.
powers.description: The character can eliminate the effects of a target losing all of their Health. Rather than falling unconscious, the target remains awake and mobile. They can use movement actions but not reactions or standard actions. This does not protect a character from death. They can be killed normally, and this power cannot bring back a dead character. Once the power takes effect, the target does not have to remain within the character's reach. When the effect ends, if the target has 0 Health or less, they become unconscious. If the target's Health rises above 0 at any point, this power automatically ends.
powers.flavor: The character can get a friend back on their feet.
powers.trigger: The target is knocked unconscious

powers.name: Levitation
powers.summary: Move through the air in any direction at Run Speed.
powers.description: The character can move through the air in any direction at their Run Speed.
powers.flavor: The character can hover and move.

featureNote.speed: You can can move through the air in any direction at your run Speed.

powers.name: Lightning Actions
powers.summary: Gain extra standard action, reaction, and Fantastic initiative.
powers.description: The character has one extra standard action and one extra reaction each turn. Additionally, they can turn their Marvel die to a Fantastic success when making an initiative check.
powers.flavor: The character has lightning-fast moves.

featureNote.initiative: All Initiative rolls can be Fantanstic rolls

powers.name: Lucky Me
powers.summary: Gain an edge on all action checks via concentration.
powers.description: The character gains an edge on all action checks made while this power is in effect. The character must pay the Focus cost at the start of each of their subsequent turns of concentration to keep the power working.
powers.flavor: Things are about to go the character's way.

powers.name: Lucky Us
powers.summary: Self and allies (1/rank) gain edge via concentration.
powers.description: The character picks up to one ally in their line of sight per the character's rank. The character and those allies gain an edge on all action checks made while this power is in effect. There is no limit on the range from the character to their allies once the power is activated. The character must pay the Focus cost at the start of each of their subsequent turns of concentration to keep the power working.
powers.flavor: The character can share their good fortune with many friends.

powers.name: Lucky You
powers.summary: Touched ally gains an edge on all checks via concentration.
powers.description: The character touches an ally. That ally gains an edge on all action checks made while this power is in effect.
powers.flavor: The character can give good fortune to a friend.

powers.name: Machine Telepathy
powers.summary: Logic check to communicate telepathically with one machine.
powers.description: The character can communicate telepathically with one machine at a time, and they must have met or seen the machine before. The communication can be verbal, visual or even more complex, such as imparting location information. There is no limit to the distance of the communication, as long as the character and the machine are in the same dimension. Simple machines do not have much to offer in the way of conversation, but they are also generally compliant with requests. Complex machines—like computers, smartphones and other electronics—are also often compliant, but if they are secured in any way, they usually refuse to communicate with strangers. A Logic check can get the character past such security, and the Narrator should set the target number according to the strength of the security.
powers.flavor: The character can communicate with machines with their mind.

powers.name: Macrodimensional Travel
powers.summary: Grow enough to travel into enlarged-space dimensions.
powers.description: The character can grow enough to travel into the Macroverse, the Overspace or other dimensions of enlarged space. They can return to their normal size at will. Note that this is something that most characters would rarely want to do, as it removes them entirely from their regular universe and places them in a dimension in which the rules of time and space work differently. An hour in the Macroverse, for example, is roughly equivalent to a month in a regular universe. A trip to the Overspace is too overwhelming for most minds to handle.
powers.flavor: The character outgrows the universe!

powers.name: Memory Blip
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check to make target forget up to one hour.
powers.description: The character causes a target with whom they've established a Telepathic Link to forget something that’s happened in the past hour. This gap can be up to an hour in length. The character makes a Logic check against the target's Logic defense. On a success, the memories are forgotten. Any time the target is given good reason to question the blank in their memory, they can make a Logic check to recover their memory. If they succeed, the original memory floods back. Ona Fantastic success, they know for sure who did this to them.
powers.flavor: The character erases a bit of someone's memory.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target has trouble on checks to recover such memories in the future.

powers.name: Mental Punch
powers.summary: Melee attack for regular Focus damage.
powers.description: The character makes a Melee attack against a target. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular Focus damage (instead of Health damage).
powers.flavor: The character can blast a foe's mind in melee.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage instead and is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Mental Shelter
powers.summary: Provide Focus DR to allies within range via concentration.
powers.description: The character extends their mental defenses to protect any chosen people within up to 5 spaces times their rank. The protected targets are granted Focus Damage Reduction my equal to the character's Uncanny power.
powers.flavor: The character can create a shelter for their mind.

powers.name: Microdimensional Travel
powers.summary: Shrink enough to travel into subatomic dimensions.
powers.description: The character can shrink enough to travel into subatomic realms. They can return to their normal size at will. Note that this is something that most characters would rarely want to do, as it removes them entirely from their regular universe and places them in a dimension in which the rules of time and space work differently. The Underspace, for example, might make a fine place to hide, but there's little else of interest there.
powers.flavor: The character shrinks out of the universe!

powers.name: Microscopic Awareness
powers.summary: Identify items (DNA, fingerprints) requiring a microscope.
powers.description: The character can see and identify items that would normally require a microscope to detect, much less comprehend. This includes things like fingerprints, a single strand of hair and even a person's DNA. In the case of DNA, the character can use this to identify a person and link them to close relatives with similar DNA.
powers.flavor: The character can detect details about the smallest things.

powers.name: Mighty 1
powers.summary: +1 Melee damage multiplier and checks; lift one size bigger.

powers.name: Mighty 2
powers.summary: +2 Melee damage multiplier and checks; lift two sizes bigger.

powers.name: Mighty 3
powers.summary: +3 Melee damage multiplier and checks; lift three sizes bigger.

powers.name: Mighty 4
powers.summary: +4 Melee damage multiplier and checks; lift four sizes bigger.

powers.name: Mind Interrogation
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check to extract answers from a linked mind.
powers.description: The character can delve into the mind of a single person with whom they have established a telepathic link. This requires a Logic check against the target's Logic defense. On a success, the character can ask a single simple question and get the answer from the target's mind.
powers.flavor: The character can root through a target’s mind.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character can get more complex information.

powers.name: Mind Reading
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check to read thoughts of a linked target.
powers.description: The character can read the thoughts ofa single person with whom they have established a Telepathic Link. This requires a Logic check against the target's Logic defense. On a success, the character can read the target's surface thoughts.
powers.flavor: The character can read thoughts.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character can ask a single simple question and get the answer from the target's mind.

powers.name: Mirage
powers.summary: Create full-sensory mirage in a linked target's mind.
powers.description: The character creates a full-sensory mirage that affects any target with whom they have established a link. The mirage can be of anything the character desires, and it can move freely.
powers.flavor: The character can make mirages appear in a target's mind.

powers.name: Mirror Images
powers.summary: Create sound/sight duplicates of self (1/rank) via concentration.
powers.description: The character creates one sound and sight illusory duplicate of themselves per rank. The duplicates look and sound exactly like them and are under their complete control. They start in the same space as the character and instantly move into any open space around them, up to 2 spaces away, during which time the character can swap places with any of the duplicates. The character's player should secretly record which one is the actual character. The duplicates can move up to 10 spaces away from the character, and they can pretend to attack (and miss) opponents. Any attack that hits a duplicate instantly removes it. If the character successfully attacks someone or does something else to make the truth evident, the illusion ends.
powers.flavor: The character conjures up illusory duplicates of themselves.

powers.name: Mists of Morpheus
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to stun target via concentration.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the target's Vigilance defense. On a success, the target is stunned and remains that way while the character concentrates.
powers.flavor: The character causes their foe to fall asleep.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target falls asleep instead.

powers.name: Mists of Munnopor
powers.summary: Create fog that blocks line of sight and prevents flying.
powers.description: The character creates a thick fog for up to 100 spaces per rank around them that blocks all line of sight beyond 10 spaces and keeps people or creatures inside it from flying, gliding or webslinging.
powers.flavor: The character weaves a thick fog.

powers.name: Molecular Destabilization
powers.summary: Melee attack to cause a same-size-or-smaller object to explode.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack against anobject their size or smaller. If the attack is a success, the object explodes. All targets within 2 spaces of the object — other than the character—take regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character causes something to vibrate fast enough to explode.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, double the damage and ignore any Health Damage Reduction.

powers.name: Multiversal Portal
powers.summary: Create a portal for two-way travel between universes.
powers.description: The character opens a glowing portal in a space next to them that moves anything that enters it between that space and its destination, which forms a matched glowing portal in the other place. The other end of the portal must be in a clear space in another universe that the character has been to. Anything can move through the portal in either direction until it is closed, which the character can do at will.
powers.flavor: The character opens a portal to another universe.

powers.name: Multiversal Travel
powers.summary: Instantly move from the current universe to another.
powers.description: The character instantly moves from their current universe to another universe. For instance: from Earth-616 to Earth-65. When they move to the other universe, they can arrive in any place they've been to before. Otherwise, they arrive at the closest available corresponding space in the other universe.
powers.flavor: The character moves from one universe to another.

powers.name: Multiversal Travel Other
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to send grabbed target to another universe.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Vigilance of a target they have grabbed. If the check is successful, the character can send the target to another universe. The target can be sent to any location in that universe that the character has been to before. Otherwise, the target arrives at the closest available corresponding space in the other universe.
powers.flavor: The character sends someone to another universe.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed

powers.name: Multiversal Travel Together
powers.summary: Move self and touched/grabbed target to another universe.
powers.description: The character moves to a different universe, taking any person they are touching with them. If the target does not wish to come along, the character must grab them first. When they move to the other universe, they can arrive in any place they've been to before. Otherwise, they arrive at the closest available corresponding space in the other universe.
powers.flavor: The character brings someone with them to another universe.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed

powers.name: Never Surrender
powers.summary: Keep 0-Focus ally from becoming demoralized via concentration.
