powers.description: The character can eliminate the effects of a target losing all of their Focus. Rather than becoming demoralized, the target can function normally without having trouble on all their actions due to their lack of Focus. They cannot spend more Focus, though, and they can still be shattered. Once the power takes effect, the target does not have to remain within the character's reach. When the effect ends, if the target has 0 Focus or less, they become demoralized. If the target's Focus rises above 0 at any point, this power automatically ends.
powers.flavor: The character can help a friend rally.

powers.name: On Your Feet
powers.summary: Reaction to allow prone allies in earshot to stand up for free.
powers.description: All prone allies within earshot, who are able to, can immediately stand up for free. Allies currently unable to stand up for any reason are not affected.
powers.flavor: The character stands their friends on their feet.
powers.trigger: An ally in line of sight and earshot is knocked prone

powers.name: Operations Center
powers.summary: Allies in earshot gain edge on all action checks via concentration.
powers.description: The character inspires one or more allies of their choice in earshot, up to the character's Vigilance defense. Affected allies gain an edge on all action checks until the start of the character's next turn. The character breaks concentration on this power if they use a movement action.
powers.flavor: The character directs their allies in combat.

powers.name: Orchestra of Overkill
powers.summary: Agility check vs Agility dealing half damage to all within 10 spaces.
powers.description: The character makes an Agility check and compares that against the Agility defense of every enemy within 10 spaces and in their line of sight. Each success does half regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character conducts a symphony of shooting.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, each enemy takes full damage instead and is bleeding.

powers.name: Orders
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check for complex orders on 0-Focus target.
powers.description: The character gives an order to a target with whom they've established a Telepathic Link and who has no Focus left. The character makes a Logic check against the target’s Logic defense. On a success, the target complies with the orders.
powers.flavor: The character forces someone to follow a complex set of orders.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character gains an edge the next time they use this power against this same target.

powers.name: Partial Phase
powers.summary: Choose to make portions of body/clothing tangible or intangible.
powers.description: The character has greater control over their phasing ability. They can make any portion of their body and clothing tangible or intangible, as they like.
powers.flavor: The character can make a portion of themselves tangible or intangible.

powers.name: Penance Stare
powers.summary: Ego attack dealing Focus damage to sinners within 3 spaces/rank.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against a target character within 3 spaces per rank. If it’s a success, the target takes Focus damage. Characters with the Heroic tag take half the listed damage from this power in either case. If a target is shattered by this power, they can recover, but they come back in one of two ways. Either they are cleansed of their sins and ready to make a new start withaclean slate, or their emotions are drained from them permanently. How this works in each case is up to the Narrator.
powers.flavor: The character can punish the wicked with their gaze.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage and is paralyzed for one round.

powers.name: Phase Object
powers.summary: Make touched object (size based on rank) intangible via concentration.
powers.description: The character can make any object they are touching intangible. The object (and things attached to or inside of it) can be up to their rank in sizes bigger than them. For example, if they are Rank 5, the object can be 5 sizes bigger than them. For an average person, this would be Gargantuan.
powers.flavor: The character can make something they're touching intangible.

powers.name: Phase Other
powers.summary: Make touched/grabbed person intangible via concentration.
powers.description: The character can make any person (and their clothing) they are touching intangible. The character can also phase any people the initial person is touching or grabbing. People the character has phased remain tangible to each other. If the target does not wish to be phased, the character must grab them first. When contact is broken, the phasing for those no longer in contact with the character (even indirectly) ends. If a person is inside something when they stop phasing, they are automatically pushed out of it but take damage from the disruption equal to a standard action check. The damage multiplier is 1 for every space they must move to reach a clear area. If this kills them, their body is trapped inside the material they were phased into.
powers.flavor: The character can phase someone they are touching.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed

powers.name: Phase Self
powers.summary: Become intangible and move through matter via concentration.
powers.description: The character (and their clothing) becomes intangible and can move through anything as if it wasn't there. Nothing can physically affect them, nor can they affect anything else that is not phasing along with them.
powers.flavor: The character can become as intangible as a ghost.

powers.name: Phase Walk
powers.summary: Move self and others through anything at Run Speed while phasing.
powers.description: When phasing, the character can move freely in any direction through anything — not just air, but also water, buildings and so on — at their Run Speed. The character can take anything or anyone they are phasing along with them. THIS IS A FREE ACTION: NOT A STANDARD ACTION
powers.flavor: The character can walk on air.

featureNote.speed: When phasing, the character can move freely in any direction through anything at their run speed

powers.name: Point-Blank Parry
powers.summary: Reaction ranged attack vs enemy within 2 spaces who misses you.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack against the enemy who missed them. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: When the enemy steps in, the character lets loose.
powers.trigger: An enemy within 2 spaces misses an attack against the character
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is bleeding.

powers.name: Possess Vehicle
powers.summary: Ego check to control touched vehicle via concentration.
powers.description: The character takes magical control of a vehicle they are inside of or touching. Hellfire engulfs the outside of the vehicle, but it does no damage to it. Anyone that comes into contact with it, though, takes regular damage with a damage multiplier equal to the characters rank. On a Fantastic success, it inflicts regular Health damage and regular Focus damage instead. The character controls the vehicle by will, as long as it is within 20 spaces times the character's rank. They use their Ego for all checks to operate it, and they get an edge on all such checks. The vehicle's speed doubles. It can climb walls at this speed and can even make jumps at that same speed.
powers.flavor: The character takes control of a vehicle.

featureNote.ego: Edge on checks to operate possessed vehicle

powers.name: Possession
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check with trouble to possess a 0-Focus target's body.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check with trouble against the Ego defense of a character who has no Focus left. On a success, the character takes over the target's body completely. The character's Ego defense is the target number for any checks to end the possession. If the character attempts to harm someone with the possessed body, the target gets to make an Ego check to end the possession. If the target has the Heroic tag, they get an edge on the check. If the character attempts to harm the possessed body, the target gets an edge on the check. If they have the Heroic tag, they get a double edge.
powers.flavor: The character takes over someone else's body.

powers.name: Postcognition 1
powers.summary: Sense events at target person/place/item from the past 6 hours.
powers.description: The character can sense what happened to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in the past six hours. If using the power to analyze a person, they sense the events from the person's point of view, using that person's senses. If the person is unconscious, dead or otherwise senseless at any point during that time, the character cannot sense anything at those points either. If using the power to analyze a place, the character can sense everything that happened in that place over that period of time, using their own senses. It seems to the character as if they are standing in their current location and position. If using the power to analyze an item, the character senses how the item was affected or used over that period of time, no matter where it was located or how it moved. They can sense things as if the item had their senses. The character can fast-forward and rewind through the period of time and stop at interesting parts, allowing them to play out in real time.
powers.flavor: The character knows what just happened.

powers.name: Postcognition 2
powers.summary: Sense events at target person/place/item from the past 24 hours.
powers.description: The character can sense what happened to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in the past 24 hours. If using the power to analyze a person, they sense the events from the person's point of view, using that person's senses. If the person is unconscious, dead or otherwise senseless at any point during that time, the character cannot sense anything at those points either. If using the power to analyze a place, the character can sense everything that happened in that place over that period of time, using their own senses. It seems to the character as if they are standing in their current location and position. If using the power to analyze an item, the character senses how the item was affected or used over that period of time, no matter where it was located or how it moved. They can sense things as if the item had their senses. The character can fast-forward and rewind through the period of time and stop at interesting parts, allowing them to play out in real time.
powers.flavor: The character knows what happened in the past day.

powers.name: Postcognition 3
powers.summary: Sense target events from any 24-hour period in the past year.
powers.description: The character can sense what happened to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in any 24-hour period in the past year. If using the power to analyze a person, they sense the events from the person's point of view, using that person's senses. If the person is unconscious, dead or otherwise senseless at any point during that time, the character cannot sense anything at those points either. If using the power to analyze a place, the character can sense everything that happened in that place over that period of time, using their own senses. It seems to the character as if they are standing in their current location and position. If using the power to analyze an item, the character senses how the item was affected or used over that period of time, no matter where it was located or how it moved. They can sense things as if the item had their senses. The character can fast-forward and rewind through the period of time and stop at interesting parts, allowing them to play out in real time.
powers.flavor: The character knows what happened in the past year.

powers.name: Postcognition 4
powers.summary: Sense target events from any week-long period in the past century.
powers.description: The character can sense what happened to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in any week-long period in the past century. If using the power to analyze a person, they sense the events from the person's point of view, using that person's senses. If the person is unconscious, dead or otherwise senseless at any point during that time, the character cannot sense anything at those points either. If using the power to analyze a place, the character can sense everything that happened in that place over that period of time, using their own senses. It seems to the character as if they are standing in their current location and position. If using the power to analyze an item, the character senses how the item was affected or used over that period of time, no matter where it was located or how it moved. They can sense things as if the item had their senses. The character can fast-forward and rewind through the period of time and stop at interesting parts, allowing them to play out in real time.
powers.flavor: The character knows what happened in the past century.

powers.name: Power Slider
powers.summary: Boost or dampen all other powers based on vital personal criteria.
powers.description: The character has a single criterion that affects the strength of their powers on a spectrum. The character starts off normal, but they can become boosted or dampened from there. When things are going well for the character, all of their other powers are boosted. If the powers have ranges or effective areas or durations, these are doubled. If the powers affect damage multipliers, add $1$ to the effects. Any effects that normally happen on a Fantastic success automatically happen on any success, not just a Fantastic one. Also, anything that would dampen their powers only brings them back to normal. When things are going poorly for the character, all of their other powers are dampened. If the powers have ranges or effective areas or durations, these are halved. If the powers affect damage multipliers, subtract $1$ from the effects. The power can no longer enjoy Fantastic successes. Also, anything that would boost their powers only brings them back to normal. These effects last for a single combat or—if they happen outside of combat—a single day. he criteria in question may go up and down often, seeming to leave the character to the whims of fate, but ignore minor changes. Only something that feels like a special moment should cause a change. Players may be tempted i to set up their characters to constantly succeed. If this happens, Narrators should remember that they can often tip matters in the other direction. The swinging back and forth makes things more fun than keeping them always on an even keel.
powers.flavor: The character's power waxes and wanes with what's vital to them.

powers.name: Powerful Hex
powers.summary: Mimic another eligible power for Focus cost + 5 via concentration.
powers.description: The character casts a hex that allows them to use any other power that they have the rank to use, even if they would not normally meet the power’'s other prerequisites. They must pay whatever the regular Focus cost is for that power, plus 5 Focus. If the duration of the used power is permanent, it is concentration for the character instead. If the power is a numbered permanent power (like Mighty 3), the Focus cost is 5 times that number instead. (Mighty 3 would cost 15 Focus.)
powers.flavor: The character simulates another power with their magic.

powers.name: Precognition 1
powers.summary: Sense likely events for person/place/item in next 24 hours.
powers.description: The character gains a sense of what is going to happen to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in the next 24 hours. The further out any particular future is, the harder it is for the character to be certain about elements of that future. However, they can sense broad paths. Especially perilous or likely (or worse, both) possibilities often stand out like beacons in the night. The player can ask the Narrator a single question about the day ahead and get an honest answer based upon what the Narrator thinks is most likely to happen. The Narrator should give short and direct answers without detailed explanations. It is perfectly fine for the answer to be cryptic and to leave the player with more questions than they started with. These answers do not dictate what is fated to happen. They only give hints as to possible futures. The choices the players make and the chances they take have a tremendous impact upon these outcomes. Terribly unlikely things happen all the time, which means that the character's sense of the future is not infallible. However, they are rarely outright wrong.
powers.flavor: The character can see the near future.

powers.name: Precognition 2
powers.summary: Sense likely events in next week or within 1 mile.
powers.description: The character gains a sense of what is going to happen to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — within the next week. The further out any particular future is, the harder it is for the character to be certain about elements of that future. However, they can sense broad paths. Especially perilous or likely (or worse, both) possibilities often stand out like beacons in the night. The player can ask the Narrator a single question about the day ahead and get an honest answer based upon what the Narrator thinks is most likely to happen. The Narrator should give short and direct answers without detailed explanations. It is perfectly fine for the answer to be cryptic and to leave the player with more questions than they started with. These answers do not dictate what is fated to happen. They only give hints as to possible futures. The choices the players make and the chances they take have a tremendous impact upon these outcomes. Terribly unlikely things happen all the time, which means that the character's sense of the future is not infallible. However, they are rarely outright wrong. Alternatively, the character can consider the fate of something within a mile of their location (rather than within their reach) over the next 24 hours. The character simply closes their eyes and thinks about the thing in question, which must be something they already know about.
powers.flavor: The character can see the week ahead.

powers.name: Precognition 3
powers.summary: Sense likely events in next month or within 100 miles.
powers.description: The character gains a sense of what is going to happen to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in the next month. The further out any particular future is, the harder it is for the character to be certain about elements of that future. However, they can sense broad paths. Especially perilous or likely (or worse, both) possibilities often stand out like beacons in the night. The player can ask the Narrator a single question about the day ahead and get an honest answer based upon what the Narrator thinks is most likely to happen. The Narrator should give short and direct answers without detailed explanations. It is perfectly fine for the answer to be cryptic and to leave the player with more questions than they started with. These answers do not dictate what is fated to happen. They only give hints as to possible futures. The choices the players make and the chances they take have a tremendous impact upon these outcomes. Terribly unlikely things happen all the time, which means that the character's sense of the future is not infallible. However, they are rarely outright wrong. Alternatively, the character can consider the fate of something within a mile of their location (rather than within their reach) over the next week, or something within 100 miles of their location over the next 24 hours. The character simply closes their eyes and thinks about the thing in question, which must be something they already know about.
powers.flavor: The character can see the month ahead.

powers.name: Precognition 4
powers.summary: Sense likely events in next year or within 1,000 miles.
powers.description: The character gains a sense of what is going to happen to a particular person, place or item within their reach — including themselves — in the next year. The further out any particular future is, the harder it is for the character to be certain about elements of that future. However, they can sense broad paths. Especially perilous or likely (or worse, both) possibilities often stand out like beacons in the night. The player can ask the Narrator a single question about the day ahead and get an honest answer based upon what the Narrator thinks is most likely to happen. The Narrator should give short and direct answers without detailed explanations. It is perfectly fine for the answer to be cryptic and to leave the player with more questions than they started with. These answers do not dictate what is fated to happen. They only give hints as to possible futures. The choices the players make and the chances they take have a tremendous impact upon these outcomes. Terribly unlikely things happen all the time, which means that the character's sense of the future is not infallible. However, they are rarely outright wrong. Alternatively, the character can consider the fate of something within a mile of their location (rather than within their reach) over the next month, or something within 100 miles of their location over the next week, or something within 1,000 miles of their location over the next 24 hours. The character simply closes their eyes and thinks about the thing in question, which must be something they already know about.
powers.flavor: The character can see a whole year ahead.

powers.name: Probability-Manipulation Hex
powers.summary: Convert ally trouble into edge within 5 spaces/rank.
powers.description: When an ally within 5 spaces times the character's rank attempts a check on which they have trouble, this hex eliminates all trouble and gives them an edge instead.
powers.flavor: The character makes unlikely things happen.

powers.name: Protection Hex
powers.summary: Ego check to set your defense score via concentration.
powers.description: The character produces a hex to help protect themselves. Make an Ego check. The result is now the character’s defense against any attack. If the result isn’t as high as the character would like, they can end the hex and try again later.
powers.flavor: The character casts a hex to protect themselves.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the hex also grants Health Damage Reduction 1 for its duration.

powers.name: Quick Phase
powers.summary: Reaction to instantly become intangible via concentration.
powers.description: The character and their clothing can instantly become intangible.
powers.flavor: The character can become as intangible as a ghost.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Quick Toss
powers.summary: Reaction Logic check to throw a grabbed target at another target.
powers.description: The character throws the grabbed person at another target. The range is determined by the level of the character's Mighty power and the grabbed person's size. The character makes a ranged attack against the target. A failure inflicts regular damage on the thrown person, who falls prone within 1 space of the target. If the attack is a success, the target takes regular damage too.
powers.flavor: The character tosses a person like a toy.
powers.trigger: A person the character can pick up is grabbed.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is knocked prone as well.

powers.name: Rally on Me
powers.summary: Once per battle, allies in earshot move toward you and heal Focus.
powers.description: Any allies in earshot can be affected, up to a number equal to the character's Vigilance. Each affected ally can move toward the character at half speed. If they are within the character's reach at the end of this move, they recover lost Focus equal to 5 times the character's rank. The character can use this power once per battle.
powers.flavor: The character rallies their friends around them.

powers.name: Razorwebs
powers.summary: Agility attack dealing Health damage via webbing; bleeds on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character makes an Agility attack on an enemy. If the attack is a success, the webbing does Health damage.
powers.flavor: The character's webbing can cut!
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the attack also causes bleeding.

powers.name: Real Jinx
powers.summary: Characters attacking you have trouble on their action checks.
powers.description: All characters who attempt to harm the character by direct action have trouble on their action checks. This does not stack with any other trouble.
powers.flavor: The character is bad luck — for their foes.

powers.name: Regain Focus
powers.summary: Recover Focus equal to your Vigilance score.

powers.name: Reinforced Skeleton
powers.summary: Gain permanent Health Damage Reduction 1.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 1.
powers.flavor: The character's bones have been reinforced or replaced with a super-strong alloy or metal.

powers.name: Repulse
powers.summary: Melee check to force touching targets away.
powers.description: The character can force something touching them — or nearly touching them — away in the same way that the Stick Around power allows them to stick things together. A character attempting to avoid being repelled must make a non-combat Melee vs. TN 16 action check. If they succeed, they can act normally. In terms of the size of something being repelled and how far it can be repelled, this works just like if the character was throwing it. The use of the power is limited only by the character's creativity. Examples include shoving away an attacker, propelling themself extra far with a jump, keeping something—or someone—hovering in the air and so on. If used to cause something to hover, the maximum altitude this lifts the target is 1 space. If used to increase a jump, this adds 1 space to the character's Jump Speed for each rank.
powers.flavor: The character can force things away.
powers.trigger: Someone attacks the character

powers.name: Resize Object
powers.summary: Grow or shrink a touched object based on your own powers.
powers.description: The character can make an object within reach grow or shrink. The character can resize the object as much as their own Grow or Shrink power would allow them to.
powers.flavor: The character can change the size of an object within reach.

powers.name: Resize Other
powers.summary: Resize touched/grabbed person based on your own powers.
powers.description: The character can resize any person (and their clothing) they are touching. The character can resize the object as much as their own Grow or Shrink power would allow them to. If the target does not wish to be resized, the character must grab them first.
powers.flavor: The character can resize someone they are touching.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed

powers.name: Restore
powers.summary: Ego vs TN 20 check to restore 1 Focus to shattered target.
powers.description: The character can bring a target back from being shattered. To attempt this, the character makes an Ego vs. TN 20 action check. On a success, the target is restored to 1 Focus. With any kind of success, the character using this power is then reduced to 1 Focus. On a failure, they only have to pay the minimum cost of 20 Focus.
powers.flavor: The character can heal a shattered mind.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is restored to full Focus.

powers.name: Resurrect
powers.summary: Ego check to restore 1 Health to recently dead target.
powers.description: The character can try to bring a target back from the dead if they do so soon after the target’s death. To attempt this, they must be able to touch the dead target's body, and that body must be relatively intact — at least enough so that if the person came back to life they wouldn't instantly die again. The character makes an Ego action check vs. a TN equal to 10 plus 1 for every hour the target has been dead. For example, if the target has been dead for four hours, the TN is 14. On a success, the target is restored to 1 Health. With any kind of success, the character using this power is then reduced to 1 Focus. On a failure, they only have to pay the minimum cost of 20 Focus.
powers.flavor: The character can help someone defy death.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is restored to full Health.

powers.name: Return Fire
powers.summary: Reaction Agility vs Vigilance attack to deal Focus damage.
powers.description: The character makes an Agility attack against a target's Vigilance defense. If the attack is a success, apply Health Damage Reduction normally. Any damage taken is then applied to the target's Focus instead.
powers.flavor: The character responds to an assault with a hail of shots.
powers.trigger: An enemy declares an attack against the character
powers.fantasticEffect: If it's a Fantastic success, the damage is doubled and, if the target takes any Focus damage, they are stunned for 1 round.

powers.name: Reverse Punch
powers.summary: Melee attack with edge that can strike from behind.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack with an edge on an enemy. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: The charactercan reach pastan enemy and punch them from behind.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Reverse-Momentum Throw
powers.summary: Reaction to knock missing attacker prone and deal half damage.
powers.description: The attacker is knocked prone and takes half the damage their attack would have inflicted if it had succeeded.
powers.flavor: The character uses the momentum of their attacker to hurl them to the ground.
powers.trigger: While Defense Stance is active, a close attack against the character misses.

powers.name: Rico-Shield
powers.summary: Ranged Agility attack (10×rank); bounces on Fantastic success.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack on a target. If the attack is a success, the target takes regular damage. When the attack(s) are over, the shield then bounces back to the character.
powers.flavor: The character ricochets their shield from target to target.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is also knocked prone, and the character can make an extra attack on another target, adding the extra range between the two targets to the new attack roll. This can be repeated until an attack is not a Fantastic success.

powers.name: Riposte
powers.summary: Reaction Melee attack against an enemy who misses you.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack on the enemy who just missed them. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: Seeing the enemy off balance, the character strikes back.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and [MELEE_EFFECT].
powers.trigger: An enemy makes a close attack against the character that fails.

powers.name: Rubberneck
powers.summary: Stretch your neck up to reach distance for line of sight.
powers.description: The character can move their head away from their body, up to their reach, to establish a line of sight to a target.
powers.flavor: The character can lengthen and twist their neck.

powers.name: Run on Water
powers.summary: Run across the surface of water without sinking.
powers.description: The character can run so that their feet skip across the surface of water. As long as they keep running (even in place), they do not sink.
powers.flavor: The character can run across water.

powers.name: Scatter
powers.summary: Reaction to allow allies (1/rank) to move half Speed and fall prone.
powers.description: Any allies in earshot can be affected, up to a number equal to the character's rank. Each affected ally can move away from you at half Speed and then fall prone. If this makes the ally an ineligible target for the initial attack, that attack automatically fails.
powers.flavor: The character warns allies to take evasive action.
powers.trigger: An enemy in line of sight declares an attack on an ally within earshot

powers.name: Sense Sins
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to sense target's soul and past horrible actions.
powers.description: The character looks into a target's eyes and makes an Ego check against the target's Ego defense. On a success the character can sense what sorts of horrible things the target has done.
powers.flavor: The character can look into a person's soul.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they can sense what sorts of horrible things the target intends to do in the immediate future.

powers.name: Sense Supernatural
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to sense supernatural presences (100 sp/rank).
powers.description: The character can reach out with their mind to sense the presence of supernatural people, places or things within 100 spaces per rank. This tells them the location of the supernatural thing and its general status. If a target or targets wish to remain undetected, the character must make an Ego check and compare it against each target's Vigilance defense. If they succeed, they sense the target.
powers.flavor: The character can sense the supernatural.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they can also identify if the target is cursed or demonic.

powers.name: Shape-Shift
powers.summary: Reaction to change into another form (±1 size).
powers.description: The character can change into another form no more than one size bigger or smaller than their regular form. When in any form, the character has access to the natural abilities of that form. For instance, if they transformed into a bird, they could fly. When transformed into a fish, they can breathe water.
powers.flavor: The character can change forms.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Shield 1
powers.summary: Gain permanent Health Damage Reduction 1 via concentration.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 1.
powers.flavor: The character wields a personal shield.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shield 2
powers.summary: Gain Health Damage Reduction 2 via concentration.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 2.
powers.flavor: The character's shield protects them like a wall.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shield 3
powers.summary: Gain Health Damage Reduction 3 via concentration.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 3.
powers.flavor: The character's shield protects better than a tank.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shield 4
powers.summary: Gain Health Damage Reduction 4 via concentration.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 4.
powers.flavor: The character's shield protects like a concrete barrier.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shield Bash
powers.summary: Melee attack for regular damage; knocks prone on Fantastic.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack on an enemy within their reach. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character bashes a foe with their shield.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is knocked prone.

powers.name: Shield Deflection
powers.summary: Reaction to give an attack against your Agility defense trouble.
powers.description: The attack has trouble.
powers.flavor: The character uses their shield to deflect attacks.
powers.trigger: The character is the target of an attack against their Agility defense

powers.name: Shield of the Seraphim
powers.summary: Magical shield absorbs attacks of 20 damage or less.
powers.description: The character produces a magical shield that protects them from physical damage. Any attacks against them that do 20 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 20 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character produces a magical shield.

powers.name: Shield Wall
powers.summary: Attacks against you have trouble via concentration.
powers.description: Attacks against the character have trouble. The character breaks concentration on this power if they use a movement action.
powers.flavor: The character stands like an impenetrable wall.

powers.name: Shrink 1
powers.summary: Shrink down to Little size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can shrink down to little size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character thinks small.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shrink 2
powers.summary: Shrink down to Tiny size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can shrink down to tiny size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character becomes even smaller!
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shrink 3
powers.summary: Shrink down to Miniature size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can shrink down to miniature size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character is smaller than an action figure.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shrink 4
powers.summary: Shrink down to Microscopic size and return at will.
powers.description: The character can shrink down to microscopic size. They can return to their normal size at will.
powers.flavor: The character is so small that they're hard to see.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shrinking Dodge
powers.summary: Reaction to give an attack against you trouble by shrinking.
powers.description: The attacker has trouble on the attack.
powers.flavor: The character shrinks to avoid an attack.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Shut Down Powers
powers.summary: Ego vs Ego check to remove all of a target's powers.
powers.description: The character picks another character within 20 spaces and makes an Ego attack against them. On a success, they remove all of a target's powers. If the target’s powers have costs, the character must pay the highest of them, or a minimum of 15 Focus.
powers.flavor: The character removes all of a target's powers!

powers.name: Silence Area
powers.summary: Fill area (5 spaces/rank) with silence via concentration.
powers.description: An area up to 5 spaces wide per the character's rank—centered on anything the character wishes, within 50 spaces—is filled with silence. Those inside the area cannot hear anything, and no one outside of it can hear any noises made inside it. The character must remain within 50 spaces of the area to avoid breaking concentration.
powers.flavor: An unnatural silence falls over the area.

powers.name: Silence Self
powers.summary: Make no noise and gain edge on sneaking via concentration.
powers.description: The character makes no noise at all — unless they wish to. They have an edge on Agility checks to sneak past people, and enemies have trouble on Vigilance checks to perceive them.
powers.flavor: Silence falls on the character.

featureNote.agility: Edge on Agility checks to sneak past people

powers.name: Slip Free
powers.summary: Reaction to automatically escape from being grabbed or pinned.
powers.description: The character is not grabbed or pinned.
powers.flavor: The character is impossible to restrain.
powers.trigger: The character is grabbed or pinned.

powers.name: Slow-Motion Dodge
powers.summary: Reaction to give an attack against your Agility defense trouble.
powers.description: The enemy has trouble on the attack.
powers.flavor: Time seems to slow down for the character, making it easy to dodge enemy attacks.
powers.trigger: An enemy makes an attack against the character's Agility defense

powers.name: Slow-Motion Shoot-Dodge
powers.summary: Two ranged Agility attacks and give Agility attacks trouble.
powers.description: The character splits their attack to make two ranged attacks against separate targets (or they can focus a single attack on a single target). Make a single Agility check and compare it to the targets Agility defenses. On a success, an affected target takes half regular damage. When the character moves, is moved, or starts their next turn, they instantly fall prone. Until that happens, all attacks against their Agility defense have trouble.
powers.flavor: The character dives sideways, weapons blazing, hanging in midair for a split second.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes full damage, and the character can make a bonus attack with this power against any available target, with the same effect.

powers.name: Smash
powers.summary: Melee attack with edge; spend Focus for damage bonus.
powers.description: The character makes a close attack with an edge. For this attack, add +1 to the character’s Melee damage bonus for every 2 points of Focus they spend. On a success, an affected target takes that total damage.
powers.flavor: SMASH!
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes double that total damage and is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Snap Shooting
powers.summary: Two ranged Agility attacks for half damage each.
powers.description: The character splits their attack to make two ranged attacks against separate targets (or they can focus a single attack on a single target). Make a single Agility check and compare it to the targets’ Agility defenses. On a success, an affected target takes half regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character shoots from the hip with deadly speed.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes full damage and is bleeding.

powers.name: Sniping
powers.summary: Ranged attack (min 20 spaces) using both Standard and Movement actions.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack against an enemy at least 20 spaces away. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage. Take both Standard and Movement action
powers.flavor: The character takes aim and shoots with deadly accuracy.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes triple damage instead.

powers.name: Soothing Touch
powers.summary: Touch to heal 1 Focus per 1 Focus spent (min 10 Focus).
powers.description: The character can restore a target creature's Focus with a touch. For every point of Focus the character spends, the target regains a point of Focus, up to their maximum score. The character must spend at least 10 Focus to use the power. Any Focus points that would have been restored beyond the target's maximum Focus are lost.
powers.flavor: The character can help get a friend's head back in the game.

powers.name: Speed Blast
powers.summary: Ranged attack to stun and knock target prone.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack. If it succeeds, the target is stunned for one round.
powers.flavor: The character fans their arms fast enough to blast a target with a gust of air!
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character is knocked prone too.

powers.name: Speed Run 1
powers.summary: Multiply Run Speed by rank; 3x faster outside combat.
powers.description: Multiply the character's regular Run Speed by their rank to get their new Run Speed. Outside of combat, they can move three times as fast.
powers.flavor: The character runs as fast as a car!

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your run speed is ×3.

powers.name: Speed Run 2
powers.summary: Move up to 50x increased Run Speed outside combat.
powers.description: Outside of combat, the character can move up to 50 times as fast as their increased Run Speed.
powers.flavor: The character runs as fast as a Jet!

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your run speed is ×50.

powers.name: Speed Swim

featureNote.speed: Outside of combat, your swim speed is ×3.

powers.summary: Multiply Swim Speed by rank; 3x faster outside combat.
powers.description: Multiply the character's regular Swim Speed by their rank to get their new Swim Speed. Outside of combat, they can move three times as fast.
powers.flavor: The character can swim faster than a dolphin!

powers.name: Spider-Dodge
powers.summary: Reaction to give Agility attack trouble and leap.
powers.description: The attacker has trouble on the attack. If the attack misses, the character can leap in any direction at their Jump Speed.
powers.flavor: The character dodges attacks with a spiderlike scuttle.
powers.trigger: Someone makes an Agility attack against the character.

powers.name: Spider-Pheromones
powers.summary: Edge on Ego checks based on attraction via concentration.
powers.description: The character has an edge on Ego (intimidation) checks against people who are not attracted to their gender. They also have an edge on Ego (persuasion) checks against people who are attracted to their gender.
powers.flavor: The character exudes pheromones that affect those nearby.

featureNote.ego: Edge on Ego (intimidation) checks against people who are not attracted to their gender. Edge on Ego (persuasion) checks against people who are attracted to their gender.

powers.name: Spider-Sense
powers.summary: Edge on Initiative/Vigilance; +2 Agility defense.
powers.description: The character has an edge on initiative checks and on Vigilance checks to perceive danger. Enemies have trouble on Agility checks against the character's Vigilance defense. The character also gains a permanent +2 bonus to their Agility defense.
powers.flavor: The character has a sense of danger that tingles when threats are near.

featureNote.vigilance: Edge on Vigilance checks to percieve danger

powers.name: Spider-Strike
powers.summary: Two Melee attacks for half damage and free movement.
powers.description: The character splits their attack to make two close attacks against separate targets within reach (or they can focus a single attack on a single target). Make a single Melee check and compare it to the targets’ Melee defenses. On a success, the affected target takes half regular damage. After the attacks, the character may run, jump or climb at half speed for free.
powers.flavor: The character strikes in a blur of punches, kicks and webbing.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the affected target takes full damage and is paralyzed by webbing. Breaking free from webbing requires a Melee check (target number 16).

powers.name: Spin & Throw
powers.summary: Reaction to damage, prone, and move a grabbed target.
powers.description: The character makes a Melee attack against the grabbed foe. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage and is knocked prone. The character can move the enemy to any open space within reach.
powers.trigger: An enemy the character can pick up is grabbed.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage and is knocked prone, pinned and stunned for one round.

powers.name: Static Illusion
powers.summary: Create visual-only static hologram within 50 spaces.
powers.description: The character creates a visual-only illusion anywhere in line of sight, within 50 spaces. The illusion can be of anything up to three sizes larger than the character, but it must be static. The character breaks concentration if they move beyond 50 spaces from the illusion or lose line of sight of it.
powers.flavor: By manipulating visual light, the character creates a realistic hologram.

powers.name: Steal Powers
powers.summary: Reaction Ego attack to remove and take all target's powers.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against the grabbed target. On a success, they remove all of the target’s powers and take them for their own. They can now use those powers as if they were always theirs. If the target's powers have costs, the character must pay the highest of them, or a minimum of 15 Focus. When the character uses a power, they must pay any cost normally as well.
powers.flavor: The character removes all of a target's powers and takes them for their own!
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed

powers.name: Stick Around
powers.summary: Stick two things together (rank distance) via concentration.
powers.description: The character can cause two things to be stuck to each other, in the same way that the Wallcrawling power allows a character to stick to surfaces. Breaking this connection requires a non-combat Melee vs. TN 16 action check, although the character can intentionally end it at any time. The use of the power is limited only by the character's creativity. Examples include sticking a person to a floor so they can't move or be taken away, sticking a door closed, sticking something to the character's back so they can keep their hands free and so on.
powers.flavor: The character can make things stick together.
powers.trigger: Someone attempts to move — or to move another character — within the power’s range.

powers.name: Stilt Steps
powers.summary: Double Run and Climb Speeds via stretching legs.
powers.description: The character's Run Speed doubles, as does their Climb Speed.
powers.flavor: The character can stretch their legs like extendable stilts.

powers.name: Stopping Power
powers.summary: Ranged Agility attack that allows a follow-up regular attack.
powers.description: The character makes a ranged attack on an enemy. If the attack is a success, the enemy takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character keeps shooting at the target.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the enemy takes double damage, and the character can make another regular ranged attack on the same target.

powers.name: Sturdy 1
powers.summary: Health Damage Reduction 1.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 1.
powers.flavor: The character has protection from physical damage.

powers.name: Sturdy 2
powers.summary: Health Damage Reduction 2.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 2.
powers.flavor: The character is protected as if by steel.

powers.name: Sturdy 3
powers.summary: Health Damage Reduction 3.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 3.
powers.flavor: The character is protected like a tank.

powers.name: Sturdy 4
powers.summary: Health Damage Reduction 4.
powers.description: The character gains Health Damage Reduction 3.
powers.flavor: The character is protected like a battleship.

powers.name: Summon Portal
powers.summary: Open glowing portal between any two seen Multiverse points.
powers.description: The character opens a glowing portal in a space next to them that teleports anything that enters it between that space and its destination, which forms a matched glowing portal in the other place. This can be between any two points in the Multiverse, as long as the character has seen the destination. Anything can move through the portal in either direction until it is closed, which the character can do at will.
powers.flavor: The character opens a portal between space and dimensions.

powers.name: Supernova
powers.summary: Ego vs Resilience check dealing half damage to all within 10 spaces.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check and compares that against the Resilience defense of every enemy within 10 spaces. For these attacks, add +1 to the character's Melee damage bonus for every 2 points of Focus they spend. On a success, an affected target takes half that total damage.
powers.flavor: The character blasts out a massive burst of their element.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, an affected target takes full damage and [ELEMENT_EFFECT].

powers.name: Suppressive Fire
powers.summary: Agility vs Vigilance attack to deal Focus damage.
powers.description: The character makes an Agility attack against a target's Vigilance defense. If the attack is a success, apply Health Damage Reduction normally. Any damage taken is then applied to the target’s Focus instead.
powers.flavor: The character forces their foes to keep their heads down.
powers.fantasticEffect: If it’s a Fantastic success, the damage is doubled, and if the target takes any Focus damage, they are stunned for one round.

powers.name: Swap Items
powers.summary: Reaction to swap possessions with target via concentration.
powers.description: The character swaps items they possess with the items of another person they can see within 2 spaces per the character's rank. These items can include weapons, clothing or anything else that is on the other person but not attached to them. When the effect ends, the swapped items return to the people who had them originally. The character can swap all of their possessions, or they can be as selective as they like. The items must generally be swapped on an equal basis, but it is possible to swap something for nothing. For instance, the character could swap what's in their hands for what’s in the target’s hands. If they are holding nothing and the target has a pistol, they can swap the pistol for nothing. If the person being swapped with is unwilling, the character must make an Ego check against that person's Vigilance defense to succeed.
powers.flavor: The character swaps objects with someone else.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Swap Places
powers.summary: Reaction to swap positions with target via concentration.
powers.description: The character swaps places with another person they can see within 2 spaces per the character’s rank. When the effect ends, the character and the other person swap places again. If the person being swapped with is unwilling, the character must make an Ego check against that person’s Vigilance defense to succeed.
powers.flavor: The character swaps places with someone else.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Swap Powers
powers.summary: Ego attack to swap all powers with target via concentration.
powers.flavor: The character swaps their powers for a target's powers.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Swap Status
powers.summary: Reaction to swap entire status with target via concentration.
powers.description: The character swaps status with a target they can see within 2 spaces per the character's rank. The character can swap their entire status with the target, or they can be selective about it. Statuses they can swap include: > Lost Health > Lost Focus > Any condition > Occupation > Traits > Tags. When swapping lost Health or Focus, the character and the target each take their maximum Health or Focus and subtract from it anything that the other person has lost at that moment. The same thing happens when the effect ends. This could potentially kill or shatter someone, so the character should be careful when doing this. When swapping occupations, the character gains the target’s position, including their authority and their responsibilities. For instance, if the character swaps occupations with the ruler of a nation, others recognize them as being the ruler for as long as the effect continues. When the effect ends, any alterations that have happened to either character swap back to the other. For instance, if one of the characters is killed while the other lives, that would swap when the effect ends. For this reason alone, characters should take extreme care with this power.
powers.flavor: The character swaps status with someone else.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Swipe Power
powers.summary: Reaction Ego attack vs grabbed target to take one power.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego attack against the erabbed target. On a success, they remove one of the target's powers and take it for their own. They can now use that power as if it was always theirs. If the power has a cost, the character must pay it or a minimum of 10 Focus. When the character uses the power, they must pay any cost normally as well.
powers.flavor: The character removes a target's power and takes it for their own!
powers.trigger: The character is attacked

powers.name: Telekinetic Attack
powers.summary: Logic vs Melee attack to deal damage with mind.
powers.description: The character makes a Logic attack against the Melee defense of a target within 5 spaces times the character's rank. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character can punch or choke an enemy with their mind.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the damage is doubled instead, and the target is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Telekinetic Barrier
powers.summary: Create invisible wall (2 sp/rank) that absorbs 10 damage.
powers.description: The character forms an invisible barrier in their line of sight and up to 10 spaces away per rank. This covers up to 2 spaces across (vertically/horizontally) per their rank. The character makes a Logic check and compares the results against the Agility defense of any target in the affected spaces. On a success, the character chooses which side of the barrier the target winds up on. On a failure, the target chooses.
powers.flavor: The character forms a protective barrier with their mind. Attacks on the barrier are against the character's Logic defense. Any attacks on it that do 10 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the barrier continues. If an attack does more than 10 points of damage, it destroys the barrier. Either way, the attack leaves those behind the barrier unharmed.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is paralyzed for one round too.

powers.name: Telekinetic Crush
powers.summary: Reaction Logic vs Resilience check to damage grabbed target.
powers.description: The character makes a Logic attack against the erabbed target's Resilience defense. If it’s a success, the target takes regular damage.
powers.flavor: The character mentally squeezes a foe.
powers.trigger: The target is grabbed
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage and is pinned.

powers.name: Telekinetic Grab
powers.summary: Logic vs Melee check to grab/pin target with mind.
powers.description: The character makes a Logic attack against the Melee defense of a target within 5 spaces times the character's rank. If the attack is a success, the character grabs the target with their mind. Breaking free requires a successful Melee check against target number 18.
powers.flavor: The character can grab a foe with their mind.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target can also be pinned.

powers.name: Telekinetic Manipulation
powers.summary: Logic check to manipulate objects with mind (5 sp/rank).
powers.description: The character can manipulate objects in their line of sight with their mind. The maximum range for this is 5 spaces times the character's rank. If someone tries to prevent the character from taking control of an object, the character makes a Logic check against the opponent's Agility defense.
powers.flavor: The character can handle physical things with their mind.

powers.name: Telekinetic Protection 1
powers.summary: Personal telekinetic field absorbs attacks of 10 damage or less.
powers.description: The character's personal telekinetic field protects them. Any attacks against them that do 10 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 10 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character uses their mind to physically protect themselves.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Telekinetic Protection 2
powers.summary: Personal telekinetic field absorbs attacks of 20 damage or less.
powers.description: The character's personal telekinetic field protects them. Any attacks against them that do 20 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 20 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character toughens their mind against physical damage.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Telekinetic Protection 3
powers.summary: Personal telekinetic field absorbs attacks of 30 damage or less.
powers.description: The character's personal telekinetic field protects them. Any attacks against them that do 30 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 30 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character's mind protects the like a tank.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Telekinetic Protection 4
powers.summary: Personal telekinetic field absorbs attacks of 40 damage or less.
powers.description: The character's personal telekinetic field protects them. Any attacks against them that do 40 points of damage or less are instantly absorbed, and the protection continues. If an attack does more than 40 points of damage, it destroys the protection. Either way, the character remains unharmed.
powers.flavor: The character's mind protects the like a fortress.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked or otherwise in danger

powers.name: Telekinetic Reinforcement
powers.summary: Reaction to transfer Health damage from protection power to Focus.
powers.description: The character can transfer any Health damage that gets through a telekinetic power that grants damage protection to their Focus instead, leaving the protection intact.
powers.flavor: The character reinforces their defenses with their mind.
powers.trigger: A character using a telekinetic power that grants damage protection is attacked

powers.name: Telekinetic Sphere
powers.summary: Logic vs Agility check to eject others and create protective sphere.
powers.description: The character envelops themselves — and any chosen people within up to 5 spaces times their rank — in a protective telekinetic sphere. When the sphere is formed, the character makes a Logic check and compares the results against the Agility defense of unwanted characters in the enclosed spaces. On a success, the character can move any unwanted people within the sphere’s perimeter to spaces outside of the sphere. On a Fantastic success, such moved people suffer full damage. Attacks on the sphere are against the character's Logic defense. Any attacks on the sphere are absorbed as if made against the character's Telekinetic Protection power, and the sphere continues. If an attack does more damage than the character's Telekinetic Protection power can sustain, it destroys the sphere, but no one inside is harmed.
powers.flavor: The character can create a protective sphere with their mind.

powers.name: Telekinetic Toss
powers.summary: Reaction Logic vs Agility check to throw a grabbed target.
powers.description: The character can telekinetically throw a person that they've telekinetically grabbed at another target. The range for the throw is 5 spaces times the character's rank. The character makes a Logic check against the target's Agility defense. A failure inflicts regular damage on the thrown person, who falls prone within 1 space of the target. If the attack is a success, the target takes regular damage too.
powers.flavor: The character can throw a foe around with their mind.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target is knocked prone as well.

powers.name: Telepathic Blast
powers.summary: Logic attack vs target in line of sight for Focus damage.
powers.description: The character makes a Logic attack against a target in line of sight. If the attack is a success, it inflicts regular Focus damage.
powers.flavor: The character can mentally blast a foe's mind.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target takes double damage instead and is stunned for one round.

powers.name: Telepathic Link
powers.summary: Logic vs Vigilance check to communicate telepathically.
powers.description: The character can communicate telepathically with one person at a time, and they must have met or seen the other person before. The communication can be verbal, visual or even more complex, such as imparting location information. There is no limit to the distance of the communication, as long as the character and the target are in the same dimension. If the other person does not wish to speak with the character, the target can automatically tune them out. To force a telepathic link, the character can make a Logic check against the target's Vigilance defense. On a failure, the character cannot attempt to communicate with the target in this way for the rest of the day. On a success, the character can communicate with the target for one round.
powers.flavor: The character can speak with another telepathically.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the target cannot shut the character out for the rest of the day.

powers.name: Telepathic Network
powers.summary: Mental communication with a group (5 per rank) via concentration.
powers.description: The character can communicate telepathically with a group of willing, linked people, each of whom they have met or seen before. The communication can be verbal, visual or even more complex, such as imparting location information. The group can number up to five people per rank. There is no limit to the distance of the communication, as long as everyone involved is in the same dimension.
powers.flavor: The character can speak telepathically with a group of people.

powers.name: Telepathic Possession
powers.summary: Logic vs Logic check with trouble to possess a 0-Focus linked target.
powers.description: The character mentally takes over someone else's body.

powers.name: Teleport 1
powers.summary: Teleport into seen space within 10×rank (combat).
powers.description: The character teleports into a clear space they can see or have been to, up to 10 times their rank in spaces away. Outside of combat, they can teleport up to 100 times their rank in spaces away.
powers.flavor: The character teleports someplace else.

powers.name: Teleport 2
powers.summary: Teleport up to 1,000 times rank in spaces away (non-combat).
powers.description: The character teleports into a clear space they can see or have been to, up to 10 times their rank in spaces away. Outside of combat, they can teleport up to 1000 times their rank in spaces away.
powers.flavor: The character teleports great distances.

powers.name: Teleport Blind
powers.summary: Teleport to unseen space within 10×rank (combat).
powers.description: The character teleports to someplace they've never been and never seen, up to 10 times their rank in spaces away. Outside of combat, they can teleport up to 100 times their rank in spaces away. If the character teleports into something solid, they are automatically pushed out of it but take damage from the disruption equal to a standard action check. The damage multiplier is 1 for every space they must move to reach a clear area. If this kills them, their body is trapped inside the material they teleported into.
powers.flavor: The character teleports someplace new to them.

powers.name: Teleport Object
powers.summary: Teleport touched object (size up to rank) with you.
powers.description: The character can teleport along with them an object within reach as far away as their Teleport power normally allows them. The object (and things attached to or inside of it) can be up to their rank in sizes bigger than them. For example, if they are Rank 4, the object can be up to four sizes bigger than them.
powers.flavor: The character can teleport something else with them.

powers.name: Teleport Other
powers.summary: Reaction Ego vs Vigilance check to teleport a grabbed target.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Vigilance defense of a target they have grabbed. If the check is successful, the character can teleport the target as far away as their Teleport power normally allows them in combat. If the target winds up in something solid, they are automatically pushed out of it but take damage from the disruption equal to a standard action check. The damage multiplier is 1 for every space they must move to reach a clear area. If this kills them, their body is trapped inside the material they teleported into.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed

powers.name: Teleport Together
powers.summary: Teleport self and touched/grabbed person with you.
powers.description: The character teleports, taking any person they are touching with them, into clear spaces they can see or have been to, up to 10 times their rank in spaces away. Outside of combat, they can teleport up to 100 times their rank in spaces away. If the target does not wish to be teleported, the character must grab them first.
powers.flavor: The character can teleport someone they are touching.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed

powers.name: Teleportal
powers.summary: Open glowing portal up to 10×rank (combat).
powers.description: The character opens a glowing portal in a space next to them that teleports anything that enters it between that space and its destination, which forms a matched glowing portal in the other place. The other end of the portal must be in a clear space the character can see or has been to, up to 10 times their rank in spaces away. Outside of combat, they can teleport up to 1,000 times their rank in spaces away. Anything can move through the portal in either direction until it is closed, which the character can do at will.
powers.flavor: The character opens a portal to another place.

powers.name: Telespot
powers.summary: Create small teleportals which you can attack through.
powers.description: As a standard action, the character can deploy small teleportals through which they can attack or otherwise affect items within 10 times their rank in spaces using the same action. As a reaction, they can deploy a small teleportal against a physical attack, deflecting it away or redirecting it to another target. They can harmlessly deflect any such attack automatically that isn't a Fantastic success. Redirecting an attack to another target requires the character to make an Agility check against the new target’s Agility defense. On a success, use the original attack’s damage against the new target. On a failure, the original attack hits the character instead.
powers.flavor: The character can create small teleportals.
powers.trigger: The character is attacked
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, double the damage.

powers.name: Thunder
powers.summary: Ego vs Resilience check to deafen all within 10 spaces.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check and compares that against the Resilience defense of every character within 10 spaces. Any character the attack succeeds against is deafened.
powers.flavor: The character causes a deafening crack of thunder.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, the character is also stunned for one round.

powers.name: Time-Out
powers.summary: Freeze time for everyone except self (1 round/rank).
powers.description: The character freezes time for everyone but themselves. For 1 round times their rank, they can act normally while everyone else seems to be frozen in place.
powers.flavor: The character freezes time.
powers.trigger: The character or an ally is attacked

powers.name: Time-Out Bubble
powers.summary: Freeze time in an area (1 space/rank) for everyone but allies.
powers.description: The character creates a time bubble that affects themselves and any chosen allies within 1 space per rank. Within the bubble, the character and those allies can act normally while everyone else seems to be frozen in place. This lasts for 1 round per rank.
powers.flavor: The character and allies step out of time.
powers.trigger: the character or an ally is attacked

powers.name: Time-Out Tag
powers.summary: Freeze time for a touched target (1 round/rank).
powers.description: The character freezes time for one person or thing within their reach. Everything and everyone else can act normally. If the target does not wish to be frozen, the character must grab them first. This lasts for 1 round per rank.
powers.flavor: The character freezes a person or thing in time.
powers.trigger: The character or an ally is attacked

powers.name: Time Portal
powers.summary: Open portal for two-way travel between time periods.
powers.description: The character opens a glowing portal in a space next to them that moves anything that enters it between that space and its destination, which forms a matched glowing portal in the other place. The other end of the portal must be in a clear space in another period of time, in roughly the same place. Anything can move through the portal in either direction until it is closed, which the character can do at will.
powers.flavor: The character opens a portal in time.
powers.trigger: The character or an ally is attacked

powers.name: Time Travel
powers.summary: Instantly move to another time period.
powers.description: The character instantly moves from their current time to another time—for instance, from the present to 1962. When they move to the other time, they can arrive in any place they've been to before. Otherwise, they arrive at the closest available corresponding space in the other time.
powers.flavor: The character moves from one time to another.

powers.name: Time Travel Other
powers.summary: Ego vs Vigilance check to send grabbed target through time.
powers.description: The character makes an Ego check against the Vigilance defense of a target they have grabbed. If the check is successful, the character can send the target to another time. The target can be sent to any location in that time that the character has been to before. Otherwise, the target arrives at the closest available corresponding space in the other time.
powers.flavor: The character sends someone to another time.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed

powers.name: Time Travel Together
powers.summary: Move self and touched/grabbed target through time.
powers.description: The character moves to a different time, taking any person they are touching with them. If the target does not wish to come along, the character must grab them first. When they move to the other time, they can arrive in any place they've been to before. Otherwise, they arrive at the closest available corresponding space in the other time.
powers.flavor: The character brings someone with them to another time.
powers.trigger: Target is grabbed

powers.name: Uncanny 1
powers.summary: Reduce Focus damage multiplier by 1.
powers.description: Any damage multiplier for attacks against the character's Focus is reduced by 1.
powers.flavor: The character has protection against mental assaults.

powers.name: Uncanny 2
powers.summary: Reduce Focus damage multiplier by 2.
powers.description: Any damage multiplier for attacks against the character's Focus is reduced by 2.
powers.flavor: The character's mind is protected as if by steel.

powers.name: Uncanny 3
powers.summary: Reduce Focus damage multiplier by 3.
powers.description: Any damage multiplier for attacks against the character's Focus is reduced by 3.
powers.flavor: The character's mind is protected like a tank.

powers.name: Uncanny 4
powers.summary: Reduce Focus damage multiplier by 4.
powers.description: Any damage multiplier for attacks against the character's Focus is reduced by 4.
powers.flavor: The character's mind is protected like a battleship.

powers.name: Understand Body Language
powers.summary: Logic check to understand/emulate culture's body language.
powers.description: When the character encounters a culture for the first time, they can make a Logic vs. TN 13 action check to puzzle out its body language. If they already know any other version of the culture's language, they have an edge. On a success, they understand and can emulate the body language.  This covers not only any potential full-body language used by an alien species but also the body language of species that use other forms of communication. With such species, understanding their body language allows the character to understand more than the target's words might communicate, such as whether a person is aggressive, shy, anxious, reckless and so on.
powers.flavor: The character can read how a person holds themself.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they permanently understand and can use it and never need to make a check for it again.

powers.name: Understand Code
powers.summary: Logic check to understand/emulate unknown code.
powers.description: When the character encounters an unknown code for the first time, they can make a Logic vs. TN 13 action check to puzzle it out. If they already know any other version of the language the code is based on, they have an edge. On a success, they understand and can communicate in the code. Digital data communication is considered a form of code, and the character can use this power to understand such data too.
powers.flavor: The character can figure out any kind of code.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they permanently understand and can use it and never need to make a check for it again.

powers.name: Understand Sign Language
powers.summary: Logic check to understand/emulate unknown sign language.
powers.description: When the character encounters an unknown sign language for the first time, they can make a Logic vs. TN 13 action check to puzzle it out. If they already know any other version of the language, they have an edge. On a success, they understand and can sign in the language.
powers.flavor: The character can get what someone is signing.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they permanently understand and can use it and never need to make a check for it again.

powers.name: Understand Spoken Language
powers.summary: Logic check to understand/speak unknown spoken language.
powers.description: When the character encounters an unknown spoken language for the first time, they can make a Logic vs. TN 13 action check to puzzle it out. If they already know any other version of the language, they have an edge. On a success, they understand and can speak the language.
powers.flavor: The character can get what someone is saying.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they permanently understand and can speak it and never need to make a check for it again.

powers.name: Understand Unusual Communication
powers.summary: Logic check to understand unusual non-verbal communication.
powers.description: When the character encounters an unknown form of communication for the first time — one that doesn't depend on hearing, vision or code — they can make a Logic vs. TN 13 action check to puzzle it out. If they already know any other version of the communication, they have an edge. On a success, they understand and can use that form of communication. This works with forms of communication that include other senses, like scent, touch, taste and so on.
powers.flavor: The character can understand any other form of communication.
powers.fantasticEffect: On a Fantastic success, they permanently understand and can use it and never need to  make a check for it again.

powers.name: Understand Written Language
